author: Mhlengi Shangase
text: Umholi we-ActionSA uMnuz Herman Mashaba KUHLUKANE imibono ngesiphakamiso seqembu i-ActionSA ePhalamende, sokunciphisa isibalo songqongqoshe kwiKhabhinethi, ngokuqeda ngezikhundla zamaphini ongqongqoshe. Leli qembu lifuna iPhalamende linikwe amandla okuthathela izinyathelo ongqongqoshe ababhacazayo uma kungukuthi umengameli wezwe uhudula izinyawo. Muva nje iPhalamende libhunge lesi siphakamiso ngaphansi koMthethosivivinywa i-Twenty-third Constitutional Amendment Bill, ehlose ukubuyekeza uMthethosisekelo wezwe. UMnuz Athol Trollip we-ActionSA, uthe asikho isidingo samaphini ongqongqoshe ngoba bafana nabantu abangenzi lutho. Uthe bamosha imali yabakhokhi bentela wathi lokhu kumosha u-R1.5 billion, ngonyaka. "Kumele sizibuze ukuthi yini umsebenzi wamaphini ongqongqoshe? Uma ongqongqoshe bengekho abakwazi ukubamba izintambo emnyangweni," usho kanje. Okunye okuhloswe nguMthethosivivinywa, wukuchitha ngevoti kongqongqoshe ababhacazayo kuphinde kuhlolwe kabanzi ongqongqoshe ngaphambi kokuqokelwa ezikhundleni. UTrollip ukhale ngobukhulu beKhabhinethi ngabantu abangu-76, ongqongqoshe abangu-33 namaphini abo angu-43. "Amaphini ongqongqoshe bafana nabantu abafudumeza izihlalo. Abanamsebenzi walutho. Umengameli unikwe amandla okususa ongqongqoshe kodwa uma engakwenzi lokhu kumele iPhalamende lingenelele." U-Advocate Glynnis Breytenbach we-DA, uthe kunemigomo abayesekayo eMthethwenisivivinywa. "Eminye yemigomo iyasikhathaza. Ukunika iPhalamende amandla kuzoshintsha ukudla epuletini." UMnuz Oscar Mathafa we-ANC, uchithe eyokuthi awanamsebenzi walutho amaphini ongqongqoshe. "Lo Mthethosivivinywa kukhona lapho ungena ugamanxa khona ezintweni ezithinta ukuqokwa kongqongqoshe. Amandla okuqoka ongqongqoshe namaphini abo akumengameli wezwe," usho kanje. UMnuz Mzwanele Manyi we-MKP, uthe uyahambisana neyesiphakamiso sokuchitha ngevoti lokungabuthembi ubuholi bongqongqoshe. "Akekho ungqongqoshe okumele kuthiwe akathintwa uma umengameli engamthatheli izinyathelo. Awabekhona amaphini ongqongqoshe athamele nemihlangano yeKhabhinethi ukuze kube nozinzo eminyangweni." UNksz Mathibe Mohlala we-EFF, uthe bayayeseka eyokuqedwa kweyamaphini ongqongqoshe. "Asikho isidingo sabo ngoba kuqokwe ibamba likangqongqoshe emuva kokumiswa kukangqongqoshe wamaPhoyisa ekubeni likhona iphini likangqongqoshe. Asihambisani neyokuchithwa ngevoti kongqongqoshe." IPatriotic Alliance ne-UDM ayihambisani nalo Mthethosivivinywa.

author: Zimbili Vilakazi
text: IBHOKISI ebelithwele isidumbu sikaNksz Happy Mthethwa ngesikhathi kuqhubeka inkonzo yomngcwabo wakhe izolo UZITHAKASELE umndeni izindaba zokuboshwa kobeyisoka lowesifazane obulawe ngesihluku ngeledlule, eNkwezane, eDoringkop, KwaDukuza. Ngokusho kukadadewabo kamufi, uNksz Kholeka Mthethwa, umsolwa ubhadanywe amaphoyisa eMelmoth, lapho okuthiwa ubebhace khona. Ubebaleke kulandela isigameko sokugwaza aphinde anqume uNksz Happy Mthethwa (35), ngeSonto eledlule. UNksz Mthethwa utshele Isolezwe izolo, ukuthi kubajabulisile ukuthola lezi zindaba ngesikhathi kusaqhubeka inkonzo yomngcwabo kamufi. “Izindaba zifike ngenduna yendawo, ethe itshelwe ngamaphoyisa ukuthi ayisidlulisele lo myalezo njengoba thina besingatholakali. Sijabule ukuthi lithi liya phansi ibhokisi likadadewethu, naye zibe sezimkhalele,” kusho uNksz Mthethwa. Uthe babone injabulo nasebusweni bezingane zikamufi uma kuvela eyokuthi sezimkhalele umsolwa. Uthe njengoba ezovela enkantolo, abakulindele ukuthi inkantolo imdedele ngebheyili umsolwa ngesihluku asenze kumufi. “Sizobe sigcwele khona nomphakathi siyosho ngazwi linye ukuthi akangadedelwa nhlobo ngebheyili. Sifuna abolele phakathi,” usho kanje. Umufi kuthiwa ubesanesikhashana esincane efudukele eGoli, ukuyozama amatoho. Kuthiwa ubebuyele izinkonzo zePhasika ngempelasonto edlule, njengoba kuthiwa wahamba wayokhonza impelasonto yonke nezinye izihlobo. Kuthiwa wathi uma ebuya ngeSonto ekuseni, wahlala isikhashana, wase ethi usaya emzini obekuhlala khona isoka lakhe ukuyolanda izingubo zakhe ngoba uselitshele ukuthi abahlukane. Kuthiwa akabange esakwazi nokuzithatha izingubo njengoba kwasuka ingxabano emzini owakhelene nalowo obekuhlala kuwo isoka, lamgwaza, wayowela kuveranda wakwamakhelwane, lapho okuthiwa nakhona lafike lahosha ummese, lase limnquma phambi kwabo. NgoLwesihlanu, kusabalale izinkulumo eziqoshiwe lapho belisho khona ukuthi alizisoli nhlobo ngokumbulala. Lezi zinkulumo kuthiwa belizithumela kwi-group ka-WhatsApp womphakathi, limsola ngokungaziphathi kahle, lathi lalishilo ukuthi lizovele limbulale. Liphinde lathuka namadoda endawo, lathi limbulele ngoba wonke angabafazi. Siye koshicilela amaphoyisa engakaphawuli ngokuboshwa kukamsolwa.

author: Fanelesibonge Bengu
text: UPANJARO elenga kwibhonethi imoto ibe iphenduka emncintiswaneni i-Red Bull Shay'iMoto Image: Craig Kolesky/Red Bull Content Pool USIVIKELE ngempumelelo isicoco sakhe uJean “Panjaro” Kruger emncintiswaneni i-Red Bull Shay’iMoto obuseSuncoast Casino, eThekwini, ngoMgqibelo ebusuku. Lo mncintiswano ubusubuya eThekwini okwesibili iminyaka ilandelana njengoba ubuqala ukuba khona nyakenye. Yilapho uPanjaro, ohlala eMahikeng, athatha khona isicoco kuBoksie waseKapa. Abashayeli banikezwa imizuzu emibili nohhafu wokuthi bashaye izidudla, bechushe nasezikhaleni, benze neminye imigilingwane ngemoto. Abanye baphuma imoto ihamba babuye bangene baqhubeke nokushayela. U-KING Tyler nomsizi wakhe benza abadume ngazo kwi-Red Bull Shay'iMoto Image: Mpumelelo Macu/Red Bull Content Pool UPanjaro uhehe izethameli elenga kwibhonethi evulekile imoto ibe ishaya isidudla. Konke abakwenzayo kumele kwenelise amajaji nezethameli nazo ezivotayo. NgoLwesihlanu ebusuku, umncintiswano uqale kunabashayeli abangu-16, kwase kuyiwa kowamanqamu ngoMgqibelo, sekusele abayisishiyagalombili. Abane abathole amaphuzu amaningi banikwe ithuba lokuzikhethela abafuna ukuqhudelana nabo. Bese kusele uPanjaro, Magesh Junior, Team VQ25, King Tyler, uBubu okunguye yedwa obemele iKwaZulu-Natal, King Kruger ongumfowabo kaPanjaro, Team 2xSpicy JZ noBemors. Uhlelo beluphethwe nguHope Mbhele nomakadebona kulo mdlalo, uVic Pardal. Ngokunqoba kabili kulandelana, uPanjaro ulandele ezinyathelweni zikaSam Sam obeyijaji okokuqala kulokhu. USam Sam wanqoba ngo-2021 nango-2022. UPanjaro ongandanga ngamazwi uthe: “Ngiyabonga kakhulu ngokungeseka, ngizonibona ngonyaka ozayo.”

author: Zimbili Vilakazi
text: UMNUZ James 'God'olulala amankankane' Mthembu owadutshulwa nyakenye UTHOLA izinsongo zokubulawa umndeni wenyanga eyayidumile KwaMhlabuyalingana, uMnuz James "God'olulala amankankane" Mthembu (61), kulandela ukubulawa komunye wabasolwa ngokuyisoconga ngeSonto. Kulesi sigameko, okuthiwa senzeke eThengani, khona eManguzi, owesilisa obegqekezelwa ngenhloso yokuthi aphucwe imoto, udubule kwafa "isigebengu", uMnuz Sifiso "Coach" Malwane. Ngokusho kwamaphoyisa, uMalwane, ubengungqondongqondo emacaleni obugebengu bokwebiwa kwezimoto endaweni, bese zeqiswa umngcele, zibhekiswe eMozambique. Kuthiwa ubulawa nje, amaphoyisa abemfunela icala lokubulawa kukaGod'olulala amankankane, owadutshulwa ngoyaba lwezinhlambu ekhaya lakhe ePhelandaba, eManguzi ngasekupheleni kuka-Okthoba nyakenye. UMalwane kuthiwa ubefunelwa necala lokudutshulwa, kubulawe uMnuz Juda Mthethwa ngoFebhuwari 2023. Umthombo ocele ukuthi ungadalulwa uthe umndeni kaGodo usuqalile ukuthola izinsongo ngoba usolwa ngokuthi ubhiyozela ukubulawa kukaMalwane. “Kuthiwa njengoba bejabula nje, nabo basazobulawa,” kusho umthombo. Uqhube wathi okwenzekayo, ukuthi kubulawe abathintekayo ekubulaweni kukaGodo, yinto umndeni obuyilindele vele njengoba ubunayo inkolelo yokuthi umufi uzozilwela nalabo abamsoconga. Ithintwa indodana kaGodo, uMnuz Mandla Mthethwa, yale yaphetha ukuphawula, yathi lolu daba lubucayi, akukho umndeni ongakuphawula. Isolezwe lihlulekile ukuthola ukuphawula komndeni kaJuda njengoba isihlobo, sithe kulukhuni ukuthi bangaphawula ngesehlakalo, kwathi ucingo lukankosikazi kamufi, lwakhala lwangaphendulwa. Osekomitini, elilwa nobugebengu obusemngceleni, uMnuz Joseph Ngubane, uthe nakuba ebulewe ungqondongqondo kodwa kusekhona ukukhathazeka emphakathini ngoba basekhona abanye abasele. Uthe bajatshuliswa wukuthi umgilwa odubule umufi ukwazile ukuzivikela, ehlaselwa. “Neyakhe impilo ibisengcupheni, nabo bebedubula bebhekise kuye,” kusho uNgubane. Uthe ithimba eliyisipesheli elasungulwa ukuze libhekane nalolu hlobo lobugebengu, lisawubambe kahle. “Kuke kuthule, ngoba izigebengu ziyalalisa, kodwa bese kubuye kubhoka ke futhi,” usho kanje, enezela ngokuthi njengoba kwenzeke isigameko nje, ikhona imoto eyiveni ethathwe kuzosa kube yizolo eBhambanana. Unxuse umphakathi ukuthi uqhubeke ubambisane namaphoyisa ekulweni nalobu bugebengu, waphinde wawuxwayisa ngokuthi uqaphele ngoba izigebengu zalolu hlobo ziyingozi. Okhulumela amaphoyisa KwaZulu-Natal, uColonel Robert Netshiunda uthe umufi ungomunye wezelamani zakwaMalwane ezaziwayo, ezisohlwini lwabasolwa abafunwa amaphoyisa ngamacala okubulala kanjalo nawobugebengu obusemngceleni. “Phakathi kwalawo macala, kukhona nelokubulala uMnuz Juda Mthethwa,” kusho uNetshiunda. Uthe umufi udutshulwe wafa ngesikhathi kubanjwa inkunzi eThengani, eManguzi, ngeSonto. Uthe uMalwane nomunye abehamba naye bagqekeze umuzi, bephethe izibhamu, bafuna ngodli izikhiye zemoto kumnikazi womuzi. “Umgilwa usheshe wathatha isibhamu sakhe, wadubula ebhekise kubasolwa, abaphunyule babaleka. Umufi ubaleka nje, udubulekile,” kusho uNetshiunda. Uthe amaphoyisa alwa nobugebengu obusemngceleni azwe ukuthi kunesidumbu esingcwatshwe ngendlela engafanele eMgodiwemvubu ngeSonto. “Amaphoyisa athole ukuthi leso sidumbu ngesikaMalwane obedutshulwe esikhathini esingengakanani ngosuku olufanayo. Kuvele ukuthi singcwatshwe ngokuyimfihlo wumfowabo, uMnuz Musa Malwane, naye ofunelwa uxhaxha lwamacala okubulala nawobugebengu obusemngceleni,” kusho uNetshiunda. Uqinisekise ukuthi lezi zelamani zifunelwa necala lokubulawa kwenyanga edumile eManguzi, uJames ‘God'olulala amankankane’ Mthembu. Uthe isidumbu sikamufi sigcine simbiwa ngokulandela uhlelo olufanele, kanti uphenyo lwamaphoyisa lusaqhubeka. Uthe nokucingwa kusaMusa nakho kusaqhubeka, wanxusa abangaba nolwazi ngokuthi uphi, bathinte amaphoyisa.

author: Fanelesibonge Bengu
text: UMCULI we-jazz, uNduduzo Makhathini, nendodana yakhe, uThingo Makhathini, asebenze nayo kwi-albhamu yakhe ezophuma ngoJuni Image: Instagram/Nduduzo Makhathini UMCULI we-jazz, uNduduzo Makhathini, ujatshuliswa ukuphrojusa i-albhamu yakhe entsha  ngokuhlanganyela nendodana yakhe, uThingo, akubona kuzoheha nentsha. UNduduzo ophinde abe wuthisha womculo njengoba eneziqu zobudokotela kuwo, ulungiselela ukukhipha i-albhamu, i-The Myth We Choose ngoJuni. Kumanje usekhiphe ingoma eyendlalelayo ethi Kuzodlula. Uthe i-albhamu uyiphrojuse ngokuhlanganyela noThingo Makhathini (18). “Ukusebenzisana noThingo akuyona into eqalayo. Kwi-albhamu yokuqala eyayithi Sketches of Tomorrow (eyaphuma ngo-2014), babekhona abantwana uNailah, uThingo noMoyo becula. Balokhu beqhamuka bevela emsebenzini ngezindlela ezahlukile kodwa useyaqala ukuhlala esihlalweni sokuthi kube wuyena umdidiyeli noma uphrojusa kule albhamu,” kusho uNduduzo ekhuluma naleli phephandaba ese-United States of America (USA), lapho enomjikelezo khona. Uthe izingane zakhe ziyawuthanda umculo ngoba beziwufunda ezikoleni zamabanga aphansi kodwa uThingo uyena obonakala ngathi ufuna ukuwuqhuba. “Ulethe izithako ezintsha ezenza ukuthi lo mculo nabantu abancane ngokweminyaka bazowuthanda kakhulu.” Uthe baningi asebenze nabo okubalwa kubo uBlack Coffee, umkakhe u-Omagugu, Dalisu Ndlazi, Lukmil Perez, Ayana Sikade, Shabaka Hutchings, Robin Fassie, Keenan Ahrends, Thando Zide noMuneyi. Uthe i-albhamu likhuluma ngomlando nendlela okuthiwa abantu bavela ngayo emhlabeni. “NgesiZulu kuthiwa sadabuka ohlangeni, kube khona abantu abanjengoMvelikuqala kube khona oNomkhubulwane. Siyabheka ukuthi mhlawumbe lezo zindaba zendabuko zixhumana nekusasa? Yiziphi kulezi zindatshana esizikhumbulayo nokuthi ziwukhanda kanjani umlando wethu nendlela yokuziphatha? Ngizama ukuxhumanisa lokho njengoba mhlawumbe eminyakeni eyikhulu ezayo, sikhulume ngoNomkhubulwane ukuthi yiziphi izindaba ezintsha eziyokwakha abantu nemiphakathi nendlela yokuziphatha.” Uphethe ngokudlulisa amazwi enduduzo ngokudlula emhlabeni kuka-Albert Mazibuko weLadysmith Black Mambazo, asebenze naye. Muva nje, bakhiphe i-albhamu ngokuhlanganyela neMambazo, kubalwa noMbuso Khoza ethi One Voice – One World. “Abantu abanjengobaba uMazibuko babe negalelo nanokuthi babe nendlela yokuthi yini abafuna ukuyishiya siyikhumbula ngabo lokho okuyifudumezayo inhliziyo ngesikhathi sokukhala. Basishiye nolwazi oluningi, basishiye namathuba amaningi futhi sizohlala sibakhumbula ngamagalelo abo. Kuye kuthiwa umuntu onjengobaba uMazibuko akahambi usekhona, uphila kumculo nezimfundiso nakho konke akwenzile emhlabeni.”

author: Zimbili Vilakazi
text: UMUFI uNkk Thuli Khumalo USHAYA amakhala umndeni wowesifazane okuthiwa ugwazwe wabulawa ngesihluku kanye nendodana yakhe eNgwelezane, eMpangeni. Kulesi sigameko esenzeke ngoLwesine olwedlule, kushone uNkk Thuli Khumalo (56) nengane yakhe yomfana uMbuso Khumalo (13). Kuthiwa izidumbu zabo zitholwe ekhaya, zinamanxeba okugwazwa emzimbeni. Ngokusho kwesihlobo esicele ukungadalulwa, umndeni kawuyizwa kahle eyokubulawa kwabo “yisigebengu”. Sitshele Isolezwe ukuthi esinye isihlobo esisondelene nomufi, sitshele umndeni ukuthi isigameko senzeke sikhona naso ekhaya. Kuthiwa sithe sona besicashile ngesikhathi isigebengu sigwaza sibulala owesifazane nendodana yakhe. “Okudidayo wukuthi esitatimendeni asibhalise emaphoyiseni, uguqukile kulokhu akusho emndenini, wathi ufike isigameko sesenzekile kodwa umbonile umsolwa kancane,” kusho isihlobo. Elanda ngalokhu okuthiwa isihlobo sikutshele amaphoyisa, umthombo uthe siwatshele ukuthi sifike ekhaya sibuya emsebenzini, saqaphela ukuthi akukhanyisiwe endlini kodwa kuvuliwe. “Uveze ukuthi uthe esengaphakathi wabona isithunzi sithi shazi, wazitshela ukuthi uMbuso. Uthe uhambe wayokhanyisa ngasekhishini, lapho abone khona ukuthi akuyena uMbuso kodwa isigebengu esiphethe ijazi lakhe ne-laptop, maqede, saphuma sabaleka,” kusho umthombo. Uqhube wathi isihlobo sitshele amaphoyisa ukuthi siphumile sasijaha isigebengu, esivele seqa uthango, sawa, sashiya phansi i-laptop nejazi. “Uthe ngesikhathi esebuyela endlini, ilapho abone khona ukuthi uMbuso ulimele, wase etshela omakhelwane,” kusho umthombo. Umthombo uthe ngesikhathi kufika umndeni nomakhelwane endaweni yesigameko, lesi sihlobo besingakayikhulumi ekalona wesifazane. “Kubuze umndeni ukuthi uphi uThuli, kwayima kuqala ecingwa. Yiso sihlobo esijike samthola kuqala phansi kombhede, naye egwaziwe,” umthombo usho kanje. Uthe awekho amaconsi egazi abeconse aze ayofika ngaphansi kombhede. Uthe basola sona isihlobo lesi ngokufa kwalaba ababili ngenxa yokushintshashintsha inkulumo uma sichaza okwenzekile. Umthombo uveze ukuthi basola ukuthi lesi sihlobo sifike sagwaza lona wesifazane, sase sifihla isidumbu sakhe ngaphansi kombhede. “Sisola ukuthi uMbuso yena ubulawelwe ukuthi ubone okuthile, naye wasale esebulawa,” sisho kanje. Umthombo uqhube wathi okunye okwenza bashaye amakhala ukuthi bathole ngasekupheleni konyaka odlule, ukuthi lona wesifazane ubehlukunyezwa kuleli khaya. “Yena uMbuso uke wagijima waya emzini wesinye isihlobo, eyocela ukuthi sizolamulela unina ngoba uyashawa. Nebala waficwa eshaywa ngempela,” kusho umthombo. Uthe yena futhi uMbuso ubethi uma edlala nezinye izingane, akhiphe amazwi athi ziyajabula zona ngoba abazo omama abashaywa muntu. “Siwatshelile amaphoyisa konke lokhu nokuthi sifuna uphenyo lwawo luqale khona egcekeni ngoba aseneme ngezitatimende ezingafani,” kusho umthombo. Okhulumela amaphoyisa KwaZulu-Natal uLt Col Paul Magwaza, uthe amaphoyisa aseMpangeni aphenya amacala amabili okubulala kanjalo nelokugqekeza kulandela isigameko esenzeke eNgwelezane ngoLwesine. "Kubikwa ukuthi ubaba uthole isidumbu sendodana yakhe nesomkakhe emagumbini ahlukene, benamanxeba okugwazwa emzimbeni. Utshele amaphoyisa ukuthi ngesikhathi engena endlini, owesilisa ongaziwa uphume eyinhlamvu ephethe ubhakha, okuthe uma ejomba uthango, i-laptop yaqathaka," kusho uMagwaza. Uthe akukaboshwa muntu ngesigameko.

author: Sibusiso Mdlalose
text: Isithombe USIHLALO weDurban City, uFarook Kadodia, ephahlwe nguNdunankulu waKwaZulu-Natal, uThami Ntuli, umengameli weKZN Sports Confederation, uThami Mchunu, umqeqeshi uPitso Dladla, uMphathiswa wezeMidlalo, uMntomuhle Khawula, nabadlali emcimbini wokuhlonipha leli qembu eSouthern Sun Hotel, eThekwini UMPHATHISWA wezeMidlalo, ubuCiko namaSiko KwaZulu-Natal, uMntomuhle Khawula, unxuse ukwesekana emaqenjini esifundazwe adlala kwiPremier Soccer League (PSL) ukuze impumelelo yeDurban City yokuzuza isicoco seNedbank Cup ibe yisikhuthazi nakwamanye akulesi sifundazwe. UKhawula ukusho lokhu ekhuluma nabezindaba emcimbini wokubungaza ukunqoba kweCity iNedbank Cup obuseSouthern Sun Hotel, eThekwini, ngeSonto. Lo mcimbi bewuthanyelwe yizikhulu zeCity, okubalwa kuzo usihlalo, uFarook Kadodia, abadlali nethimba labaqeqeshi, abaxhasi beCity, aboMnyango wezeMidlalo, ubuCiko namaSiko, uNdunankulu wesifundazwe, uThami Ntuli, izikhulu zeSafa KwaZulu-Natal nesifunda iTheku neKwaZulu-Natal Sports Confederation. “Eminyakeni ewu-16 isifundazwe sakithi KwaZulu-Natal sagcina ukunqoba indebe, abafana bamaCitizens bakwenzile lokho, basiqeda isomiso sezindebe. Ngakho sibonga kakhulu kumqeqeshi, uPitso Dladla, usihlalo uKadodia (Farook), ithimba labaqeqeshi, nawo wonke umuntu oyingxenye yaleli qembu ofake isandla empumelelweni yalo. Okuqaphelekayo wukuthi yisizini yokuqala le iDurban City ingenile esigabeni esikhulu seBetway Premiership, kodwa isikwi-Top 8 futhi ayisaphumi, yaphinda yathatha indebe. Siyathokoza futhi ukuthi njengamanje kwi-Top 8 AmaZulu akhona, iGolden Arrows ibukeka izoba khona, neRichards Bay iyasondela,” kusho uKhawula. “Lokhu kusinika ithemba lokuthi kungenzeka sibe namaqembu amaningana kwi-MTN8 ngesizini ezayo. Impumelelo yeDurban City kufanele ibe yisikhuthazi nakwamanye amaqembu akulesi sifundazwe engifisa ukuthi kube nokubambisana kuwona, yize edlala ngokuncintisana. Ukubambisana nokwesekana kwawo kungahamba ibanga ekubuyiseni isithunzi nempumelelo ebholeni laKwaZulu-Natal, eyikhaya lebhola. NeMilford FC noma ingakwazanga ukunqoba iligi (yeMotsepe Foundation Championship), nayo sinethemba lokuthi izophumelela kuma-Play-Offs, yandise isibalo samaqembu akulesi sifundazwe kwiPremiership, futhi sizoyeseka.” ICitizens ibe yiqembu lokuqala laseKZN elinqobe isicoco selokhu kwagcina iLamontville Golden Arrows ngo-2009 inqoba indebe ye-MTN8. Usihlalo weCitizens, uKadodia, uzwakalise ukuthobeka ngomcimbi abawenzelwe wuMnyango wezeMidlalo esifundazweni ukubabonga nokubahlonipha ngokunqoba kwabo iNedbank. “Ibhola laKwaZulu-Natal bekungafanele lilinde isikhathi eside kangaka ukuthola impumelelo. Futhi amaqembu aKwaZulu-Natal akufanele adonse kanzima avike izembe kuwona wonke amasizini. Ibhola kufanele libe yimboni, lithuthukise abantu, lidale amathuba omsebenzi lithuthukise nezokuvakasha. Uma ibhola lisebenza, nomphakathi uyasebenza. Ligcina intsha imatasa, ihlengeke ezidakamizweni nasebugebengwini,” kusho uKadodia. Namuhla ngo-12.30 emini ezitaladini zaseThekwini, kuzoba nombhiyozo weCity nendebe yeNedbank Cup. Kuzosukwa eKing Dinuzulu Park, kubhekwe eMoses Mabhida Stadium.

author: Fanelesibonge Bengu
text: IJaecoo J5 hybrid okulindeleke ukuthi ifike eNingizimu Afrika ngoJulayi Image: Fanelesibonge Bengu INKAMPANI eneminyaka emithathu ikhona, i-Omoda & Jaecoo, isizibekele umgomo wokuthi kuphele u-2027 ibe isidayisa izimoto ezingaphezu kwesigidi ngonyaka. Kule minyaka emithathu eyedlule, i-Omoda & Jaecoo isikwazile ukudayisa izimoto ezingu-1 million emhlabeni jikelele kodwa manje isifuna kungayithathi iminyaka. ENingizimu Afrika iJaecoo izibule nge-J7 eyi-SUV kwathi i-Omoda yona yazethula nge-C5. Isikhulu sakwa-Omoda & Jaecoo International, uShawn Xu, sikhuluma kwiChery International Business Summit, eWuhu, eChina kuleli sonto, sithe kule minyaka emithathu edlule sebekwazile ukuvula amagaraji angu-1 364 emazweni angu-69. UXu the bazimisele ngokuqhubeka nokudlondlobala, yingakho beziphosela inselelo yokudayisa izimoto ezingu-1 million ngonyaka. Eminyakeni emithathu ezayo i-Omoda & Jaecoo izokwethula izimoto ezintsha ezingu-13 emhlabeni jikelele, ngokusho kwesikhulu sakwaChery International, uZhang Guibing. I-Omoda & Jaecoo ingenye yezinkampani ezingaphansi kweChery. ENingizimu Afrika kulindeleke ukuthi umndeni wamaJaecoo wande nge-J5 hybrid, okanye i-SHS ngokolimi abalusebenzisayo. I-J5 ekhona emakethe yakuleli njengamanje ayiwona unhliziyombili njengoba ihamba kuphela ngenjini kaphethroli engu-1.5 litre turbo enamandla angu-115kW. KwaJaecoo bazishaya isifuba ngokonga kwe-J5 SHS kuphethroli kulandela ukuthi izintatheli zasemazweni ayisishiyagalolunye zincintisane ngokuthi wubani ozokonga kakhulu kuphethroli eChina. EzaseNingizimu Afrika zilale isithathu zihamba 625km iveza ukuthi idla 3.7l/100km. Kwabaphumelele ibidla 3.4l/100km. IJaecoo J8 plug-in hybrid yiSUV elayisha abagibeli abayisikhombisa okusabhekwa ukuthi ingeza yini eNingizimu Afrika Image: Fanelesibonge Bengu Le moto kulindeleke ukuthi itheleke kuleli ngoJulayi. Kubo kwayo bathi kuphethroli idla amalitha angu-5.3 ngo-100km. Phakathi kwezinto enazo kubalwa i-touchscreen infotainment system enkulu ngaphakathi, inqwaba yezinsiza zomshayeli nezokuphepha, izihlalo zesikhumba nokunye. Imininingwane ephelele ngayo nentengo sizobika uma isifika. Enye engase itheleke yi-J8 SHS plug-in hybrid. Iyi-SUV enkulu alayisha abagibeli abayisikhombisa abahlala ezihlalweni eziyisikhumba. Esomshayeli isihlalo ngisizwe sintofontofo futhi besingiwotawota. Ngemuva nokho besithanda ukuqina mbijana. Kulesi sikhashana engizithole ngikuyo ibizwakala intofontofo kakhulu. Ine-sunroof, i-touchscreen infotainment system enkulu, ama-airbag angu-10 nezinsiza zomshayeli. Inenjini kaphethroli engu-1.5 litre turbo esebenza nezikagesi ezintathu njengoba amandla ziwafaka kuwo wonke amasondo. Amandla lawa angu-395kW ne-torque engu-650Nm. Bathi uma ithangi likaphethroli elingu-70 litres nebhethri elingu-34.46kWh ligcwele ungahamba 1 400km.

author: Nokubongwa Phenyane
text: UMCULI kamaskandi, uKhuzani Mpungose odume ngeleNdlamlenze, usememezele ukuthi uma kuvuma izimo, umcimbi i-Blu Nation Festival uzoza eThekwini, ngonyaka ozayo. Lo mcimbi obanjelwe eCarnival City, Ekurhuleni, uKhuzani ubehlose ngawo ukujabulisa nokubonga abalandeli bakhe ngawo. Kulo mcimbi obekuvalwe ngomuntu emnyango, amathikithi akhona athengwa aphela kusasele amasonto amathathu kube usuku lomcimbi. Kwacaca ukuthi abalandeli bakaKhuzani bawubheke ngabomvu lo mcimbi. Kuwona bekuboshelwe abaculi abahlukene bakamaskandi iningi labo elishisa izikhotha kulezi zinsuku. UKhuzani ubonge abalandeli bakhe ngokuqhubeka bemeseka kulo mcimbi akhipha kuwo unyawo uma kuziwa kumfashini. BEKUGCWELE kuswelakala indawo yokunyathela eCarnival City emcimbini i-Bu Nation Festival ebingoMgqibelo "Sithanda ukubonga kuwona wonke umuntu osesekile ngalo mcimbi. Kodwa esithanda ukukudlulisa ukuthi iCarnival City isincane, abantu bagcine behlala ngaphandle ngenxa yokuthi banethemba lokuthi bazothola amathikithi nendawo ngaphakathi kodwa akwangenzeka lokho. Kusibekele obala lokho ukuthi sidinga indawo enkulu eGauteng, ehambisana nesibalo sethu, " kusho uKhuzani.0 Uveze ukuthi manje badinga indawo ezobavumela ukuthi umcimbi bawenze kuze kube sekuseni, wathi lokhu okwenzeka kuwo kuseyisiqalo, umbono ngalo mcimbi usemkhulu kuye. UMCULI kamaskandi, uKhuzani "Ndlamlenze" Mpungose usememezele ukuthi uma kuvuma izimo, umcimbi i-Blu Nation Festival uzoza eThekwini, ngonyaka ozayo. Lo mcimbi ube nesasa eGauteng ngempelasonto UKhuzani ubonge abaculi, abaxhasi, abaphathi bohlelo nawo wonke umuntu owenze umcimbi waba impumelelo. Kulo nyaka umsakazi woKhozi FM, uZimiphi Biyela umemezele ukuthi sekungokokugcina ukuthi aphathe uhlelo kuwo njengoba esethi khumu kulo mkhakha. UMCULI kamaskandi, uKhuzani "Ndlamlenze" Mpungose usememezele ukuthi uma kuvuma izimo, umcimbi i-Blu Nation Festival uzoza eThekwini, ngonyaka ozayo. Lo mcimbi ube nesasa eGauteng ngempelasonto

author: Charles Khuzwayo
text: AYANDA amaciko aseka umkhankaso wokuxosha abantu bangaphandle abakuleli ngokungemthetho. Kwaqala umlingisi wodumo kuMkhokha The Curse, uDeli Malinga, obengapheli kumamashi eMarch and March, ikakhulukazi eThekwini. Lo mkhankaso, owasungulwa wuJacinta Ngobese owayengumsakazi weVuma FM neGagasi FM, ube sewujoyinwa wumlingisi weShaka Ilembe uNkosikhona "Phakel'umthakathi" Ndabandaba nowayengumsakazi woKhozi FM, uNgizwe Mchunu. Umculi wamapiano uMbongeni "Oscar Mbo" Ndlovu uthe iNingizimu Afrika eyabantu abadabuka kuleli. "Kwanele. Uma abantu bangaphandle befuna ukuba kuleli, abalandele imigudu efanele. Njengomuntu ohambela kakhulu amazwe angaphandle, ubunzima esihlangabezana nabo uma sifaka isicelo sokwamukelwa abuchazeki." Uthe amanye amazwe abeke imigoqwana eyenza kubenzima ukungena kuwona. "Kungani thina singakwenzi lokho? Okunye abantu abangakwazi wukuthi kuthatha amahora angu-7 kuya kwawu-8 ukungena eLagos, eNigeria (noma ngaphezulu uma unganabo obhululu abangakusiza ukuthi ungene khona) ngenxa yemithetho yeVisa yakhona. "Uma ungene ngendlela engafanele, bakubuyisela ezweni lakho ngokuphazima kweso. Asikho isizathu sokuthi iNingizimu Afrika imumathe inqwaba yabantu. Hhayi ngeke!" Nomculi we-Afro jazz uSimphiwe Dana, uthe uyahambisana impela nomkhankaso woNgizwe kodwa wakhala ngokucwaswa kwabantu abathandana nabanobulili obufana nobabo. Usomahlaya waseMpangeni, uCeleste Ntuli, uqale waxolisa ngenkulumo ayisho ngo-2022. Uthe wayengeqondile ukuthi uzwelana nabantu bokufika abangenamvume yokuba kuleli kodwa wayekhuluma ngokunye. Uthe ayekukhuluma kwenye iPodcast akuhlangene nomkhankaso woJacinta. Ngakolunye uhlangothi, umholi we-EFF uMnuz Julius Malema, uthe angancamela ukungavotelwa wumuntu uma evotelwa abantu abazonda abantu bakwamanye amazwe ase-Afrika. UMalema ubekhuluma emcimbini weCollen Mashawana Foundation eGoli. Abantu bamgxeke kakhulu uMalema ngale nkulumo, bathi ucabangelela isisu sakhe hhayi abantu bakuleli.

author: Mthokozisi Mncuseni
text: UKAMOGELO Sebelebele obe yiqhawe le-Orlando Pirates ngokuyilamulela emdlalweni wabakhaya neKaizer Chiefs kwiBetway Premiership UMDLALI we-Orlando Pirates osephenduke isithenjwa, uKamogelo Sebelebele, uveze ukuthi nakuba kubaphoxile ukuphazanyiswa yiKaizer Chiefs embangweni wesicoco seligi yeBetway Premiership kodwa lokhu akusho ukuthi sekufanele baphonse ithawula. IPirates isaqhwakele kwi-log yize ilahle amaphuzu amqoka ngokubambana neChiefs emdlalweni weBetway Premiership ngempelasonto edlule, e-FNB Stadium, eNasrec. Okusemqoka ukukuqaphela ngalo mphumela wukuthi iPirates ihleli ngesinqe esisodwa esicongweni ngoba iMamelodi Sundowns eyimise kabi, isele ngomdlalo. USebelebele owasayiniswa iPirates njengomdlali wasezimpondweni esuka kwi-TS Galaxy, usengomunye wababizwa kuqala uma kuboshelwa ukhonkolo wodonga lwasemuva esikimini sePirates. Nakuba ehlalisa ebhentshini abadlali abanamava kule ndawo okunguDeano van Rooyen noBandile Shandu kodwa kunzima ukuphikisa isinqumo somqeqeshi, u-Abdeslam Ouaddou, ngoSebelebele kwazise nguyena olamule kukubi emdlalweni weChiefs. USebelebele osebonakale emidlalweni engu-27 kuyona yonke imiqhudelwano ubengaqali ukulamulela iPirates kunzima kwazise nakwiMTN 8 wenza okufanayo bebhekene neSundowns kowandulela owamanqamu. Kule midlalo engu-27, uSebelebele useshaye amagoli amahlanu okungamathathu eligi namabili kwi-MTN8. Ngesikhathi lo mdlali ekhuluma nethimba labezindaba lePirates emuva komdlalo wabakhaya, akafihlanga ukuthi baphoxekile kodwa wafunga ukuthi akekho kubona ozogobisa ikhanda kule midlalo esele. “Ukudlala ngokulingana neChiefs kuyafana nokulahla amaphuzu kwazise sisembangweni wesicoco onzima neqembu elisijwayele,” kusho uSebelebele kwi-Orlando Pirates TV. “Kusobala ukuthi iChiefs ibikuhlelile ukuthi izosidlalisa kabi. Kubukeka sengathi kuyisizile lokhu ngoba nakhu yona ithole umphumela okubukeka sengathi ibiwufuna. “Ngiyavuma kuyasiphazamisa lokhu embangweni kodwa ngiyafunga ukuthi ngeke kusenze siphelelwe wukuzethemba kumbe kusifakele umqondo wokuphonsa ithawula ngawo. “Kuningi okusengenzeka kule sizini ngakho-ke okwethu wukuqinisa ekutheni kasisaqhuzuki kungafanele njengoba senzile kwiChiefs."

author: Nonkululeko Nhlapo
text: UMazwi Kubheka kuthiwa uzifikele yena emaphoyiseni Amaphoyisa aseVosloorus ayakuqinisekisa ukuthi uMazwi Mpumelelo Kubheka, 27, okwabikwa ukuthi udukile ngo-2 Ephreli 2026 utholwe ephephile. Kuthiwa uzethule esiteshini samaphoyisa eVosloorus ngobusuku bangomhla ka-2 Meyi 2026. Ubunikazi bakhe sebuqinisekisiwe futhi uzohlanganiswa nomndeni wakhe ngemuva kokuhlolelwa udokotela. Okwamanje, izimo mayelana necala lomuntu olahlekile zisabonakala ziyingcosana futhi uphenyo lwamaphoyisa lusaqhubeka. "Lo muntu uvele esiteshini samaphoyisa eVosloorus ngobusuku bangomhla ka-2 Meyi 2026. Kuqinisekisiwe ukuthi uyena ngempela uzohlanganiswa nomndeni wakhe ngemuva kokuhlolwa impilo," kusho okhulumela amaphoyisa uColonel Dimakatso Nevhuhulwi. Iziphathimandla zithe izimo ngokunyamalala kwakhe azikacaci, njengoba manje kusaphenywa ukuze kutholakale ukuthi kwenzekani phakathi nezinsuku ezicishe zibe ngu-30 enyamalele. "Okwamanje, izimo mayelana necala lomuntu olahlekile azikacaci futhi uphenyo lwamaphoyisa lusaqhubeka," kwengeza uNevhuhulwi.

author: Fanelesibonge Bengu
text: I-Omoda C4 ikhanyisa ngamalambu angamaLED ngaphambili nangemuva Image: Fanelesibonge Bengu KUNGEKUDALA umndeni wakwa-Omoda eNingizimu Afrika uzokwandiswa nge-C4 evezwe okokuqala embukisweni iBeijing Auto Show, eChina, ngesonto eledlule. I-C4 izongena ngaphansi kwe-C4 esiphenduke intandokazi, hhayi kuphela kuleli, kodwa nakwamanye amazwe njengoba kuyiyona moto i-Omoda eyazethula ngayo emphakathini. Kulindeleke ukuthi incintisane namanye ama-SUV angangayo okubalwa i-VW T-Cross, Chery Tiggo 4 Pro neKia Sonet. Ibukeka izoheha abaningi ngendlela ekhanga ngayo ngaphandle njengoba inama-criss amahle emzimbeni. Ngaphandle ungalindela amalambu angama-LED ngaphambili nangemuva kanjalo namarimu angu-18 inch. Ngimangazwe yisikhala ngaphakathi kwayo ngoba ngaphandle ibukeka iqoqekile. Ivulekile bo! Ngaphakathi i-Omoda C4 ayinalo uxhaxha lwamabhathini njengoba okuningi ukwenza kwi-touchscreen infotainment system engu-13.2-inch Image: Fanelesibonge Bengu Ilayisha abagibeli abayisihlanu futhi okumnandi ngemuva phakathi nendawo ezinyaweni wukuthi akukho gquma elikhona nokwenza kuhlaleke kahle. Khona ngemuva abagibeli banezimbobo zokukhipha umoya we-aircon kanjalo nezindawo ezimbili zokushaja nge-USB. Ibhuthi ilingana nayo kodwa ngithe ngiphenya ngangalibona isondo eliyisipele. Nokho kusengenzeka ukuthi elethwa kuleli ifike nalo. Ngaphambili amehlo ami athathwe yibhathini lokuyidumisa elizishaya sengathi ele-Lamborghini. Kwesinye kunezinto ezincane njengamabhathini ezikwenza uzibone usezingeni elingaphezu kwemoto okuyo. Kugqama ne-touschreen infotainment system enkulu lapho wenza khona cishe konke. Ukwazi nokudlala i-game kuso. Nangemuva ikhanyisa ngamalambu angamaLED i-Omoda C4 Image: Fanelesibonge Bengu Okhakhayini ubona isibhakabhaka kodwa aluvuleki. Kwa-Omoda & Jaecoo eNingizimu Afrika bathembise ukuyiletha ungakapheli lo nyaka. Yilapho futhi kuzoqinisekiswa khona nezinhlobo zezinjini ezizayo kodwa bakuvezile ukuthi bazoletha ekaphethroli nengunhliziyombili, i-hybrid. Izobe inezinsiza zomshayeli ezengeza ezokuphepha ezingu-16, amakhamera aveza umzimba wonke nokunye. Uma izobiza intengo encane ibukeka izothatha abaningi.

author: Simangaliso Ntshangase
text: UMCULI wama-piano uZee Nxumalo usemenyezelwe yiSpotify ukuba yinxusa lohlelo lwayo lokuqhakambisa amaciko esifazane KUVALEKE amanxeba esilonda esidalwe wukuqokwa eminxeni eyisikhombisa kepha wangathola ndondo yamaMetro FM Music Awards kumculi wama-piano uZee Nxumalo, othole ingqayizivele yethuba alinikwe yinkampani edlala umculo nge-internet i-Spotify. Lo mculi,ongaconsi phansi kubalandeli bomculo, umenyezelwe ngabeSpotify ukuthi sebemkhethe njengenxusa lohlelo lwabo lwazinyanga zonke oluthi -EQUAL Africa, onhloso yalo wukuqhakambisa ubuhle bemisebenzi eyenziwa abesifazane emculweni. I-Spotify idalule ukuthi lo mculi ufakwe kulolu hlelo ngenxa yokuthi kuthe sekuhlanganiswa izibalo zezingoma zamaciko ezilalelwe nezidlalwe kakhulu nyakenye, kwavela ukuthi uZee Nxumalo odabuka eSwatini, kodwa osezinze eGoli uqenggeleza phambili. Kuvele ukuthi umculo okuzwakala iphimbo likaZee Nxumalo kuwona uqale ukugqama kakhulu ngo-2024 ngengoma yakhe ethi Funk 55 - ayishaya noDBN Gogo, uCeekaRSA, Chley neShakes & Les, esidayise ngaphezu kwe-platinum eliphindwe kahlanu. UMCULI wama-piano uZee Nxumalo usemenyezelwe yiSpotify njengenxusa lohlelo lwayo lokuqhakambisa amaciko esifazane Uqhubekile nokuhamba phambilini ngengoma yakhe ebishisa izikhotha nyakenye ethi Ngisakuthanda, apike kuyona oPYY Log Drum King no-TBO. Ezikhulumela ngokuthola leli thuba, uZee uthe into abona ukuthi imsize kakhulu ukuze afike kulesi sigaba akusona manje wukwenza umculo wakhe ngendlela afisa ngayo nakholelwa kuyona, wangabe esazixaka kakhulu ngokulandela okushiwo abantu. “Sengifundile ukuthi kumqoka ukuvikela indawo yami nobumina uqobo, okuyinto engenzekanga kalula ngoba ekuqaleni bengihlale ngikhathazeka kakhulu ngokuthi abantu bacabangani ngami. Manje sengizibeka mina phambili nengikuzwa ngaphakathi,” usho kanje. Uthe ithuba alithole manje lisho lukhulu kuyena ngenxa yokuthi libeka ngokusobala ukuthi ukwenza umculo ngendlela ethinta nejabulisa abantu akuphoqi ukuthi ube wubulili obuthile kuphela, kepha kudinga ukuthi wenze okusuka ngaphakathi kuwena zikhathi zonke, nokuthi ukholelwe entweni oyenzayo. UMCULI wama-piano uZee Nxumalo useqokwe yiSpotify ukuba abe yinxusa lohlelo lwayo lokuqhakambisa amaciko esifazane Bekungekhona okokuqala leli ciko lihlonishwa ngemisebenzi yalo, njengoba ngesonto elidlule linqobe indondo ye-Best Upcoming African Music Sensation kuma-African Golden Awards abese-Nairobi, eKenya. Ngale kwalokhu, uZee - ogama lakhe lokuzalwa wuZandile Nxumalo, uvele usematheni nge-EP yakhe esanda kuphuma esihloko sithi Izinja Zam Volume 1 - eyelama imisebenzi yakhe yaphambilini ethi KwaNxumalo EP (2022), KwaNxumalo: Deluxe (2023), nayegcine ngayo ngo-2024 esihloko sithi Inja YeGame EP.

author: Mhlengi Shangase
text: UMHOLI waseBuhleni kwaShembe uNyazilwezulu ngesikhathi ehlangene nabaholi beKhomishini yezoKhetho kuleli sonto IZIKHULU zeKhomishini yezoKhetho kuleli zinabefundisi bakwaShembe ngesikhathi zihlangene noNyazilwezulu ZISONGE uhambo lwaKwaZulu-Natal ngokuhlangana neKhabhinethi yesifundazwe izikhulu zeKhomishini yezoKhetho kuleli. Lezi zikhulu beziqhubeka nokuhlangana nezinhlaka ezehlukene kuleli, okubalwa amaqembu ezepolitiki, abamahlelo ahlukene, amakhosi kanjalo nezinye izinhlaka. NgoLwesibili izikhulu ebeziholwa nguSihlalo weKhomishini, uMnuz Mosotho Moepya, zihlangane nomholi webandla lakwaShembe, ohlangothini lwaseBuhleni, uNyazilwezulu, KwaMhlabuyalingana. Kulo mhlangano lizikhulu beziyondlala izinhlelo zokhetho oluzayo, lwangoNovemba 4, 2026. Isitatimende seKhomishini emuva komhlangano, sithe obekuseqhulwini wukuqinisa eyokusebenzisana njengoba kuzoba nokhetho lohulumeni basekhaya. "Sifuna umphakathi ubambe iqhaza ezinhlelweni zokuvota ikakhulu eKZN. Sizimisele ukuxazulula zonke izikhalo ezithinta ukhetho nokuvota. Siyazibophezela ekubambeni ukhetho olunokuthula nolukhululekile," kusho iKhomishini ethe lube yimpumelelo uhambo lwayo. Izkhulu zeKhomishini zihamba ziphinde zibuyele kulesi sifundazwe nje, yingoba kunombiko owaveza ukuthi abantu bakulesi sifundazwe, abasayingeni eyokubamba iqhaza okhethweni. Lolu cwaningo lwajutshwa yiKhomishini ukuzwa ukuphawula komphakathi ngezithinta ukuvota kuleli. Kwenzeka lokhu nje, ngenyanga ezayo kuzovulwa ithuba lokuthi abantu babhalisele ukuvota. Lokhu kuzokwenzeka ngempelasonto yangoJuni 20 no-21. Abantu bayanxuswa ukuthi babhalisele ukuvota ngoba kulolu khetho bazokwazi ukuvota kuphela lapho bebhalise khona. Kwenzeka lokhu nje iqembu iMKP lifuna luhlehliswe ukhetho ngoba lisakhala ngokuthi labanjwa inkunzi emiphumeleni yokhetho lukazwelonke lwango-2024. Izikhulu zekhomishini zihlanganile muva nje nomholi waleli qembu uMnuz Jacob Zuma mayelana nezikhalo anazo kodwa yathi iyaqhubeka necala elizongena ngenyanga ezayo elimayelana nesikhalo ngale miphumela.

author: Zakhele Xaba
text: URELEBOHILE Mofokeng we-Orlando Pirates ezama ukudlula nebhola kuThabo Nodada weDurban City emdlalweni weBetway Premiership e-Orlando Amstel Arena, eSoweto, ngoMgqibelo Image: Isithombe:BACKPAGEPIX UMQEQESHI we-Orlando Pirates, u-Abdeslam Ouaddou, uyikhombe eMbombela Stadium imibhiyozo kulandela ukubajwa kwezakhe yiDurban City emdlalweni obekufanele bawunqobe ukuze bezoqukula isicoco seBetway Premiership phambi kwezinkumbi zabalandeli e-Orlando Amstel Arena, eSoweto, ngoMgqibelo ntambama. IPirates iphume nephuzu emdlalweni ophele ngo 0-0 obekubhekwe ukuthi izoqoqa kuwona amathathu, ilingane neMamelodi Sundowns esesicongweni se-log yePremiership ngamaphuzu angu-68. EZimnyama zisendaweni yesibili ngawu-66. Emdlalweni wokugcina wesizini, zizobhekana ne-Orbit College, evika izembe, eMbombela Stadium, eMpumalanga, ngoMgqibelo ngo-3 ntambama. Lo mdlalo usushintshe kwaba yiwona ophethe injabulo nezinyembezi zabalandeli bePirates abagcina ukubona iqembu labo liqukula isicoco seligi ngo-2012. Umdlalo ne-Orbit bekubhekwe ukuthi uzoba ngowokuyojabula nokunika abanye abadlali ithuba lokuzibonakalisa. Emuva komdlalo, u-Ouaddou, uthe uyakholwa ukuthi nakanjani bazowuqedela eMbombela umsebenzi ngempelasonto ezayo. "Ekuqaleni kwesizini ngasho ukuthi umbango weligi uzoqhubeka kuze kube wusuku lokugcina. Angikhathazekile kodwa ngijabhile ngoba asiwinanga. Kodwa masiyeni emdlalweni wokugcina siyoqukula indebe. Sekuphele iminyaka eminingi iPirates ingayiwini iligi futhi lokho kubonakele ngamatata enkundleni. Kubafana bami ngifuna ukuthi hambani niyothatha isicoco ngempelasonto ezayo,"kusho u-Ouaddou kwiSupersport. Enkundleni, iPirates ifake ingcindezi kusukela ekuqaleni komdlalo kodwa ukuqina kodonga lwasemuva lweCity lwenze abagadli beZimnyama bathwala kanzima.

author: Mthokozisi Mncuseni
text: ISITOBHA seKaizer Chiefs, u-Aden McCarthy, esibheke iwini kwiSiwelele FC UMPHUMELA weSiwelele FC wakamuva ibhekene ne-Orlando Pirates kwiBetway Premiership kufanele usebenze njengesixwayiso kwiKaizer Chiefs ngobunzima ezobhekana nabo emdlalweni weBetway Premiership namuhla ngo-7.30 ebusuku, eFree State Stadium, eBloemfontein. Lesi yisexwayiso sesitobha seChiefs, u-Aden McCarthy, ebesikhuluma ngobumqoka bokuqoqa amaphuzu kwiSiwelele ngesikhathi silumana indlebe nethimba lezindaba leChiefs. Amakhosi azobhekana neSiwelele eshayela phezulu kulandela ukuphazamisa kwawo iPirates embangweni wesicoco seligi oshubile neMamelodi Sundowns. IChiefs ayisazi isibhaxu emidlalweni eyisikhombisa yakamuva. Iwine eyisihlanu, yadlala ngokulingana kwemibili. NgokukaMcCarthy, iSiwelele izoba yingozi kubona uma bezoyiyela ngobuso njengoba isanda kuphazamisa iPirates. Leli qembu eliphekwa nguLehlohonolo Seema, lafika e-Orlando Amstel Arena, eSoweto lenza okungajwayelekile ngesikhathi libuya nephuzu ngegoli elashaywa ngumdlali wakudala wePirates, uVincent Pule. “Ubufakazi bokuthi unzima kangakanani umdlalo esiya kuwona bulele kumphumela otholwe yiSiwelele ngesikhathi ibhekene nePirates muva nje,” kusho uMcCarthy. “Ngiwumqemane njengoba ngidlalile kowabakhaya kodwa ngaphambi kwawo kukhona ebengingakuzwa kahle okusondelene nokudonseka komsipha. “Engingakusho wukuthi bengingalimele kepha bengiphunyuzwa ukugwema ukuthi kuze konakale kuye phambili. “Ngizijabulela mina kakhulu ngoba ukudlala eBloemfontein kimina kusho lukhulu kwazise kulapho ubaba wami (uFabian McCarthy) aqala khona. Siya kulo mdlalo ngokuzethemba kodwa lokhu akusho ukuthi kufanele siyiyele ngobuso (iSiwelele). “Banenqwaba yabadlali beqophelo eliphezulu nokufanele sibaqaphe ngeso lokhozi. Akusekuningi esikuyela emidlalweni ngaphandle kwamaphuzu agcwele kwazise nesizini isiyela emaphethelweni." IChiefs ehlulwe wukungena kwi-MTN8 amasizini amabili elandelana, ibukeka isendleleni ebheke kwiCaf Confederation Cup amasizini amabili elandelana. Isendaweni yesithathu ngamaphuzu angu-47 emidlalweni engu-25. Imiswe kabi ngaMaZulu asendaweni yesine ngamaphuzu angu-42 emidlalweni engu-26. Amakhosi adinga ukuqeda endaweni yesithathu ukuze ezobuyela kwiConfederation Cup. Emabhukwini eSiwelele kukhona abadlali ababolekiswe yiChiefs okunguSamkelo Zwane noHappy Mashiane abalizwa ngendaba ijezi kuleli qembu.

author: Sabelo Nsele
text: Umengameli Cyril Ramaphosa Image: File/IOL graphics UNGOTI wezomthetho ubona lulude ukhalo oluzohanjwa njengoba uMengameli Cyril Ramaphosa, ememezele ukuthi uzophonsela inselelo umbiko wethimba elalijutshwe iPhalamende ukuba liphenye ngokuntshontshwa kwezishaqane zamadola aseMelika epulazini lakhe, iPhala Phala. Ungoti weDonda Attorneys, uMnuz Melusi Xulu, uthe uhlelo lokukhipha uRamaphosa esikhundleni lungase lunyomfe ukufakwa kwesicelo esiphonsela inselelo umbiko wethimba elaliholwa owayeyijaji, uSandile Ngcobo. UXulu uthe uRamaphosa angase afake isivimbelo esizonqanda ukuqhubeka kohlelo lwasePhalamende lokumkhipha esikhundleni. URamaphosa umemezele ukuthi uzophonsela inselelo umbiko owathola ukuthi kungenzeka ukuthi kukhona imithetho ayephula ekusingathweni kodaba lokuntshontshwa kwemali epulazini lakhe. Enkulumweni abeyibhekise ezweni, uRamaphosa uveze ukuthi ngeke asule esikhundleni. URamaphosa uthe uyasihlonipha isinqumo senkantolo kodwa wathi umbiko wethimba elalijutshwe iPhalamende unamaphutha. "Nginqume ukuphonsela inselelo umbiko wethimba. Angikwenzi lokhu ngoba nakhu ngingalihloniphi ikomiti kodwa ngenza lokhu ngoba ngikholelwa ukuthi kunamaphutha embikweni wethimba." URamaphosa uthe umbiko wethimba ugcwele izinto ezingenabufakazi. "Inzwabethi yonke lena equkethwe umbiko wethimba." UXulu uthe kungase kuthathe isikhathi eside ukuthi inkantolo inqume esicelweni esizofakwa uRamaphosa. "Kungathatha izinyanga noma unyaka. Ukhumbule ukuthi uma icala ezolifaka enkantolo enkulu, uma kuwukuthi akuhambi ngendlela afisa ngayo kungenzeka adlulele enkantolo yamacala adlulisiwe. Angaze afike eNkantolo yoMthethosisekelo. Uzokhumbula ukuthi isicelo se-EFF salalelwa ngo-2024 kodwa isinqumo size saphuma ngo-2026. Ngakho ke kunzima ukusho ukuthi icala lizothatha isikhathi esingakanani." UXulu uthe uhlelo lokukhipha uRamaphosa esikhundleni luzoqhubeka uma engasifaki isivimbelo senkantolo. "Uma engasifaki isivimbelo senkantolo bazoqhubeka nabakwenzayo. Kuzomele asifake isicelo sokuvimba ukuqhubeka kohlelo lokumkhipha esikhundleni. Uma engakwenzi lokho uzothi eqhubeka enkantolo nabo bebe beqhubeka ngapha." Amaqembu ezepolitiki afuna ukuthi luqhubeke uhlelo lokukhipha uRamaphosa esikhundleni yize ephonsela inselelo umbiko wethimba. Okhulumela i-IFP, uMnuz Mkhuleko Hlengwa, uthe iPhalamende kufanele liqhubeke nomsebenzi walo. "Uhlelo lokukhipha uMengameli esikhundleni luwumsebenzi wePhalamende okungafanele umiswe ukuthi kunecala elifakiwe. Kufanele uhlelo luqhubeke kanye necala." Okhulumela i-EFF, uMnuz Sinawo Thambo, uthe bebevele bekulindele ukuthi uRamaphosa uzophonsela inselelo umbiko. "Akananembeza. Silindele ukuthi uSomlomo (uNkk Thoko Didiza) asiphikise isicelo sikaRamaphosa. Nathi sizosiphikisa isicelo sikaRamaphosa. Yini emenze ukuthi alinde isikhathi eside ukuthi aphonsele inselelo isinqumo senkantolo. IPhalamende kufanele liqhubeke nezinhlelo zalo. Izinhlelo zePhalamende akufanele zimiswe isicelo sikaRamaphosa."

author: Sibusiso Mdlalose
text: Isithombe UKHULISO Mudau oyisethenjwa seMamelodi Sundowns ezodlala nePolokwane City namuhla ebusuku koweBetway Premiership eSeshego Stadium, ePolokwane UKULAHLA amaphuzu kweMamelodi Sundowns emidlalweni emibili yakamuva yeBetway Premiership, kuyishiye nenselelo yokuvuka izithathe njengoba izobhekana nePolokwane City kabili kulandelana. ISundowns esembangweni oshisa phansi weligi yePremiership ne-Orlando Pirates, iphazanyiswe yiStellenbosch FC emgqigqweni wayo iyibamba ngo 1-1. Iphinde ilahle elinye ithuba lokubuyela esicongweni se-log yePremiership ibambana ngo 1-1 neRichards Bay FC ngeSonto, eMhlathuze Sports Complex, eRichards Bay. AmaSandawana asendaweni yesibili kwi-log yePremiership ngamaphuzu awu-58 ngemuva kwe-Orlando Pirates esaqhwakele ngawu-59. Azotholana phezulu nePolokwane namuhla ngo-7.30 ebusuku, eSeshego Stadium, ePolokwane. Azophinda adudulane nePolokwane kowomzuliswano wesibili ngeSonto ngo-3 ntambama, eLoftus Versfeld Stadium, ePitoli. IRise and Shine ezabalazela ukuhlala kwi-Top 8, kubukeka sekuyiyona esiphethe ukhiye wesicoco seligi yamaSandawana embangweni weligi. Leli qembu laseLimpopo liwaphonsele inselelo amaSandawana ngesizini edlule njengoba liwaguqise ngo 1-0 emzuliswaneni wokuqala wangesizini edlule. Ngakho lokhu kwenza le midlalo emibili elizoyidlala namaSandawana ibhekwe kakhulu ukuthi leli qembu lingakwazi yini ukuphinda liphazamise umgqigqo waleli qembu lasePitoli elisazihambela lodwa ngokudla izicoco zePremiership amasizini elandelana kusukela ngesizini ka-2017/2018. Oyisitobha seSundowns, uKhuliso Mudau, ubona kusemqoka kakhulu kubona ukuvuka bazithathe ngowePolokwane. “Lesi yisikhathi sokuthi sibhekane nomdlalo ngamunye, singazifakeli ingcindezi ngokunye okwenzekayo. "Umdlalo esizowudlala nePolokwane City kuzoba ngumdlalo onzima, ikakhulukazi njengoba sizodlala nayo imidlalo emibili ilandelana ngesikhathi esifushane. "Kodwa kusemqoka ukuthi sinqobe kwiPolokwane, sibuyise ithemba silethe nenjabulo kubalandeli bethu ngemuva kokulahla amaphuzu sidlala ngokulingana imidlalo emibili, okuyinto esingajwayele ukuyenza," usho kanje uMudau.

author: Simangaliso Ntshangase
text: UPAPA Penny usule isigubhukane ekubeni yilungu leMK Party nasekubeni yilungu laleli qembu ePhalamende UMAKADEBONA emculweni nezikaqedisizingu obesegxile kwezepolitiki, uGezane Eric Kobane, odume ngelikaPapa Penny - ukhale ngobunyoka ebuholini beqembu lezepolitiki uMkhonto Wesizwe Party (MK) ngenkathi esula isigubhukane kulona ngoLwesihlanu. Encwadini yakhe yokwesula ayibhekise kumholi weqembu uMnuz Jacob Zuma, uPapa Penny uthe ukwesula ekubeni yilungu le-MKP nasekubeni yilungu layo ePhalamende kube yisinqumo esingelula neze nesimphule inhliziyo. Uthe wajoyina i-MK Party ngokwakhe ngoba efuna ukukhulula abantu bakuleli zwe, kodwa lokho kwaphazamiseka ngenxa yengxenye ethile yobuholi baleli qembu eLimpopo - akhale ngokuthi idale ukuthi abe nyamanambana emalungwini eqembu. Ukhale nangokuthi ubebhekene nezimpi ebeziqondiswe kuyena, ehlukunyezwa futhi kwenziwa isiqiniseko sokuthi uhlale ezizwa ecindezelekile. Wengeze nangokuthi bekuze kusetshenziswane nabezindaba ukucekela phansi isithunzi sakhe negama lakhe akusebenzele kanzima. UPAPA Penny usule isigubhukane ekubeni yilungu leMK Party nasekubeni yilungu laleli qembu ePhalamende Image: VUYILE MADWANTSI Njengoba ngiwumuntu okhathalele inhlalakahle yabantu neyomphakathi, bengingazibekezelela lezi zimo ukube beziyimbangela yabanye abantu abaseceleni. Manje inkinga yami wukuthi ziqhamuka ngaphakathi eqenjini ebengikulona okwenza ukuthi kube nzima ukuzishaya indiva sengathi angiboni ngibe ngibona kahle,” kusho uPapa Penny. Nokho uthe nakuba kunjalo, uyazibongela kuZuma ngokumnika ithuba lokuthi amele iqembu ePhalamende futhi amele nabantu baseNingizimu Afrika esebenzisa amandla eMK Party. Leli qembu eliholwa wuZuma owayengumengameli wezwe, lilokhu liqhubeke njalo nokubhekana nezinkinga ezilizamazamisayo selokhu langenela ukhetho lukazwelonke eminyakeni emibili edlule, okufakazelwa wukuhlale kushintsha izinto ngaphakathi kulona. Sekuvamile ukuthi lihlale lipheka lithulula ezikhundleni ezihlukene. Ukwesula kukaPapa Penny kulindeleke ukuthi kushaye kuzwele kuleli qembu eLimpopo, ikakhulu kuMasipala wesifunda iMopani naseGiyani, okuyilapho enabalandeli kakhulu khona. UPapa Penny uke waba nohlelo kwiMzansi Magic obeluthandwa kakhulu oluthi Papa Penny Ahe - nolwakhonjiswa amasizini amane. Wafungiswa ukuba yilungu lePhalamende le-MK Party emva kokhetho lukazwelonke ngo-2024.

author: Sabelo Nsele
text: Izimoto ezinikelwe umnyango kaCogta UTHATHWE emalini yezinye izinhlelo zoMnyango wezokuBusa ngokuBambinsana kanye neziNdaba zoMdabu KwaZulu-Natal u-R 19 million okuthengwe ngawo izingqovungqovu zezimoto ezinikwe imikhandlu yamakhosi angu-30 KwaZulu-Natal. Ingxenye yemali ethenge lezi zimoto ezingundaba mlonyeni bekuhlelwe ukuthi kuholelwe abasebenzi abebezoqashwa umnyango. Lokhu kuqukethwe empendulweni ebhalwe phansi yoMphathiswa woMnyango, uMfu Thulasizwe Buthelezi, obephendula imibuzo yelungu leDA, uNksz Marlaine Nair. UButhelezi uveze ukuthi banqume ukuthi imali bathenge ngayo izimoto ngenxa yokubambezeleka kohlelo lokuqashwa kwabasebenzi abebezoholelwa ngale mali. Enye imali bekufanele ithenge imishini yamakhompyutha. "Sithathe yonke le mali engazange isebenze sabe sesithenga izimoto, asizange sisebenzise ngokweqile isabelomali soMnyango." UButhelezi uthe bazoqhubeka nokuthenga izimoto ezizonikelwa emikhandlwini yamakhosi. Uveze ukuthi izimoto zohlobo lweFord Everest ezingu-12 ebiza u-R772 259 ngayinye, kanye nama-GWM P300 D/C angu-18 abiza u-R563 494 ngayinye. UNksz Nair uthe usephinde wabhalela uButhelezi eminye imibuzo. Uthe bafuna ukwazi ukuthi izimoto azithengangwa yini ngemali ebibekelwe ukulekelela omasipala noma ukubhekana nezinhlekelele. UNksz Nair uthe bafuna ukwazi ukuthi imikhandlu yamakhosi izokwazi yini ukumelana nezindleko zalezi zimoto okubalwa ukufaka uphethroli, ukukhokhela imishwalense, ukulungisa izimoto namasondo. UNksz Nair uthe ufuna ukuthi uMnyango uchaze kahle ukuthi yiluphi uhlelo olulandelile ngesikhathi ukhetha imikhandlu yamakhosi enikwe izimoto. Ukuthengwa kwezimoto sekususe umsindo njengoba ubuholi benhlangano yobuholi bomdabu, iCongress of Traditional Leaders of SA (Contralesa) KwaZulu-Natal busola ukuthi uButhelezi wakhetha iphela emasini ngesikhathi aba izimoto. Ngesikhathi kwethulwa izimoto uMnyango wathi zizonikwa amalungu endlu yobuholi bomdabu KwaZulu-Natal, osihlalo kanye namaphini osihlalo bezindlu zobuholi bomdabu ezifundeni. Abaholi beContralesa KwaZulu-Natal baveza ukuthi kukhona osihlalo abashiywa ngaphandle ngesikhathi kwabiwa izimoto, bathi kukhona amakhosi angebona osihlalo kodwa ahlomula. Ngokohlu lwamakhosi ahlomula oluqukethwe empendulweni kaButhelezi, bayisithupha osihlalo abathola, kwathola amaphini osihlalo amabili. Kunezifunda ezingu-11 KwaZulu-Natal. Uhlu luveza ukuthi kunamakhosi angu-14 angamalungu engeziwe ezindlu zobuholi bomdabu ezifundeni ahlomula. IContralesa KwaZulu-Natal isanda kubika izikhalazo zayo kusihlalo wekomiti elibhekelele ukusebenza komnyango ePhalamende, uDkt Zweli Mkhize.

author: Mhlengi Shangase
text: UMPHATHISWA woMnyango wezeMfundo KwaZulu-Natal, uMnuz Sipho Hlomuka KUXWAYISWE abazokopela njengoba kuqale ukubhalwa kwezivivinyo zika-matric omdala kanjalo nalabo ababhala izivivinyo zeNational Senior Certificate KwaZulu-Natal. Lesi sexwayiso sikhishwe uMphathiswa wezeMfundo esifundazweni, uMnuz Sipho Hlomuka, izolo, njengoba bengu-25 399 ababhala lezi zivivinyo. UHlomuka uthe bazobhekana nomthetho abazophambana nemigomo yezivivinyo. "Ngeke siyibekezelele eyabazobanjwa bekopela noma ukuputshuka kwamaphepha njengoba kuqale izivivinyo. Kumele ngaso sonke isikhathi sivikelwe isithunzi sezivivinyo. Bazobhekana nomthetho abazobanjwa bephula imigomo yokubhalwa kwezivivinyo," kusho uHlomuka. Uthe kunabafundi abangu-14 240 ababhala u-matric iNational Senior Certificate esuka ngo-2008 kuze kube yimanje. Kunabangu-11 159 ababhala u-matric wangaphambi kuka-2008, ababhalayo. "Kuqeqeshwe abazoqapha ukubhalwa kwezivivinyo abangu-1 000, ezindaweni ezingu-900 zokubhalela. Kuqokwe abamakayo abangu-681 kanti izincwadi zokubaqasha zizokhishwa ngoJuni 19." Ukumakwa kwamaphepha kulindeleke ukuthi kuqale ngoJulayi 3, kuphothulwe ngoJulayi 9. "Imiphumela izokhishwa ngo-Agasti 7, 2026. Kuzogaywa amaphepha okubhalwa abalelwa ku-8 million." Uthe benze izinhlelo zokubhekana nokuguquka kwesimo sezulu njengoba kubhalwa. "Sinezingxoxo eziqhubeka ukuqinisekisa ukuthi akukho okuphazamisa izivivinyo okubalwa nesimo sezulu." Unxuse ababhalayo ukuthi basheshe bafike ezikhungweni zokubhala, baphathe nezincwadi zabo zokubhala. Ubakhumbuze nokuthi bangabakhohlwa omazisi babo wathi uma sebebhala bangatatazeli. "Ababeke umoya phansi, bangatatazeli. Abakholelwe ekutheni babhala into abasebenze kanzima beyifunda." Uhlabe nekhwelo kubazali, umphakathi nothisha ukuthi beseke ababhalayo. Uphinde waveza nokuthi sebehlelela izivivinyo zokuphela konyaka zika-matric. Uveze nokuthi ngenyanga ezayo kuzobhalwa nezivivinyo zamaphakathi nonyaka zika-matric zokuhlola ukulungela kwabafundi ukubhala izivivinyo zokuphela konyaka. Uthe uzoveza okuningi uma esethula isabelomali somnyango esiShayamthetho ngoJuni 12, 2026. Kuzokhumbuleka ukuthi lesi sifundazwe siqophe umlando siqwaqwada zonke ezinye izifundazwe emiphumeleni yanyakenye ka-matric. Lesi sifundazwe senza kahle phezu kwezingqinamba ezikhona emnyangweni zemali. Lezi zingqinamba zenza umnyango ungakwazi ukukhokha ngesikhathi imali yezikole eyaziwa ngama-Norms and Standards. Awukwazi ngisho ukukhokhela ngesikhathi osonkontileka owenza nabo imisebenzi okubalwa nabathenga izincwadi zokufunda. Nyakenye umnyango uhluleke ukuthenga izincwadi zokufunda ezikoleni, wakwazi ukuthenga kuphela i-stationery ngenxa yemali.

author: Sibusiso Mdlalose
text: Isithombe UMQEQESHI weDurban City, uPitso Dladla, nowe-TS Galaxy, uBernard Parker, okuyibona abazobe behola la maqembu kowamanqamu eNedbank Cup kusihlwa ePeter Mokaba Stadium, ePolokwane NGAPHANDLE kokuthi ukufinyelela kweDurban City kowamanqamu weNedbank Cup yinto ebingacatshangwa yiningi lezingqapheli nabathandi bebhola jikelele baseNingizimu Afrika njengoba kuyisizini yayo yokuqala esigabeni seBetway Premiership, kungase kube yingqophamlando nakumqeqeshi wayo imbala, uPitso Dladla. UDladla (47), ongumqeqeshi osabambile kwiCity, uzohlala ebhentshini njengenhloko yabaqeqeshi njengoba bezobhekana ne-TS Galaxy kowamanqamu weNedbank Cup namuhla ngo-6 ntambama, ePeter Mokaba Stadium, ePolokwane. Lo mqeqeshi ubanjiswe izintambo zokuqeqesha ekuqaleni kukaFebhuwari ngemuva kokuxoshwa kukaSinethemba Badela. Usethubeni lokuba ngumqeqeshi waKwaZulu-Natal ozoqeda isomiso seminyaka engu-16 sezindebe emaqenjini akulesi sifundazwe. Usethubeni futhi lokuziqophela owakhe umlando ngokuba ngumqeqeshi wokuqala waleli qembu laseThekwini ozonqoba indebe kwiPremiership. “Asizikhathazi ngemidlalo yethu emithathu esingenzanga kahle kuyona ngaphambi kwalo mdlalo wamanqamu esizowudlala ne-TS Galaxy. Umdlalo womkhumulajezi wehlukile kunomdlalo weligi, ngakho umdlalo wamanqamu esiya kuwo sizowuthatha ngendlela ehlukile,” kusho uDladla. Emidlalweni emine yePremiership ngaphambi kowamanqamu wePremiership, iCitizens ihlulwe yiMamelodi Sundowns, Lamontville Golden Arrows neMagesi FC, ngaphambi kokudlala ngokulingana ngo 1-1 ne-Orbit College. “Ukufinyelela kwethu lapho esikhona manje (kowamanqamu) akukhona okwami kuphela, kodwa kungenxa yokubambisana ethimbeni lethu labaqeqeshi engibala kulo u-Ashraf Hendricks noRowen Fernandez. Kithi lo mdlalo wamanqamu mukhulu kuneqembu ngoba asimele iDurban City nje kuphele kodwa simele idolobha iTheku nesifundazwe sonke iKwaZulu-Natal. Ukwesekwa esikuthola eMnyangweni wezeMidlalo esifundazweni oholwa uMntomuhle Khawula, kuyisikhuthazi esikhulu kithina njengoba ethembise ukukhipha  amabhasi azothwala abalandeli abazoseseka benze inkundla iPeter Mokaba ifane nenkundla yethu yasekhaya iChatsworth Stadium.” UMDLALI wasezinhlangothini, uSamkelo Maseko, ngomunye wabazothwala amathemba aleli qembu uma selibhekene neTS Galaxy emdlalweni wamanqamu weTS Galaxy ePeter Mokaba Stadium, ePolokwane, namuhla. UDladla odabuka eHambanathi, oThongathi, ungomunye wabaqeqeshi asebeqeqeshe kuzo zonke izigaba zebhola eNingizimu kusukela kwezama-amesha kuze kufinyelele kwesikhokhelayo sePremier Soccer League (PSL). Ngesizini ka-2016/17 wayeqeqesha noRonnie Gabriel uThongathi FC  ludla isicoco sikazwelonke seSafa ABC Motsepe League, lwakhushulelwa kwiMotsepe Foundation Championship. Ngemuva kwamasizini amane eqeqesha esigabeni seMotsepe Championship, ngesizini ka-2021/22 wanqoba isicoco seligi neRichards Bay FC esebenza naye uGabriel. Ngesizini edlule ubesethimbeni labaqeqeshi leCitizens ngesikhathi inqoba isicoco seMotsepe Championship eyiphini likaSimo Dladla. Nakuba eseyibamba-mqeqeshi kuleli qembu kodwa uliqonda kangcono kwazise usehlale kulona amasizini amathathu. Lokhu kumbeka ethubeni elihle lokulinqobela isicoco, aziqophele umlando wokuba ngumqeqeshi wokuqala waKwaZulu-Natal ozonqoba iNedbank Cup okuyindebe engakaze itholwe yiqembu lakulesi sifundazwe kusukela ngo-1971 umqhudelwano usabizwa nge-Life Challenge Cup. ICity efudukele eThekwini ngesizini edlule ka-2024/25, seyike yafinyelela kowamanqamu eNedbank ngesizini ka-2017/18, isaziwa ngeMaritzburg United, yaguqiswa kowamanqamu ngo 1-0 yiFree State Stars. IGalaxy nethuba lomunye umlando IGalaxy yaKwaNdebele, eMpumalanga, yaqopha umlando ngesizini ka-2018/19 iba yiqembu lokuqala elalidlala esigabeni seNational First Division (esiyiMotsepe Championship) eliqukule indebe yeNedbank ngokuguqisa iKaizer Chiefs ngo 1-0 kowamanqamu. Isethubeni lomunye umlando kowanamuhla wamanqamu. Leli qembu liya kowamanqamu liholwa wuBernard Parker njengebamba lomqeqeshi, kulandela ukukhonjwa indlela kuka-Adnan Beganovic onganqobanga nowokubika umdlalo kwengu-11 yakamuva. Nokho, njengoba kuyinto eyaziwayo ukuthi umdlalo womkhumulajezi nowamanqamu uvamise ukuyintshinga ngewindi ifomu yeligi, kungemangaze ukuvuka inja ebomvu kwaleli qembu. UParker, owazakhela igama esengumgadli ovutha uphondo kwiChiefs eminyakeni embalwa edlule, naye usethubeni lokuziqophela owakhe umlando ngesicoco sakhe sokuqala njengomqeqeshi uma kwenzeka i-The Rockets iphakamisa iNedbank. Ukubeke ngokucacile ukuthi akayifakile emqondweni wakhe eyokuqashwa ngokugcwele kodwa ugxile emsebenzini asanikwe wona njengamanje wokuhola iqembu. “Angikakucabangi lokho. Okwami wukuqinisekisa ukuthi ngenza lo msebenzi engisanikwe wona ukuqinisekisa ukuthi ngiwenza kangcono nangokusemandleni ukufaka umoya wokulwela impumelelo kubadlali. Kungenzeka noma yini kowamanqamu,” kusho uParker owanqoba iNedbank Cup esagijima kwiChiefs. “Njengomqeqeshi osemncane, ngiyafunda usuku nosuku. Luselude uhambo engisazoluhamba kule ndima yokuqeqesha. Ngakho asikho isidingo sokuxhamazela, okumqoka nje wukusebenzisa ithuba enginikwe lona.” Isithombe ISIKHWISHIKHWISHI se-TS Galaxy, uSeluleko Mahlambi

author: Nokubongwa Phenyane
text: U-CHRIS Q Radebe ongumbhali womdlalo othi Shut Up Men Are Talking UMLINGISI ophinde abe umbhali wemidlalo, uChris Q Radebe, useveze ukuthi yize umdlalo othakaselwe abaningi othi Shut Up Men Are Talking, nobukhonjiswa kwiYouTube, wanqatshwa iziteshi zethelevishini. Ukusho lokhu ngemuva kokukhonjiswa kwesiqephu sokugcina salo mdlalo nasikhiphe ngesonto eledlule kule nkundla yezokuxhumana. Abantu bamshayele ihlombe uChris ngalo mdlalo kodwa kwaba nemibuzo yokuthi kungani lo  ungekho kwithelevishini? Ekhuluma neSolezwe, uthe ngaphambi kokuthi umdlalo aqale awufake ekhasini lakhe kwiYouTube, wawuhambisa esiteshini esizimele iNetflix kodwa bawenqaba. "Angigcinanga lapho, ngaya nakwezinye iziteshi nakhona bakhombisa ukungawuthakaseli kodwa ngabona ukuthi ngendlela onesifundo ngayo, kumele ugcine ufinyelele ebantwini bawubone. Ngafikelwa umqondo wokuthi angiwufake ekhasini lami enkundleni engaziyo ukuthi abantu bayakwazi ukufinyelela kuyo futhi ngempela bawuthakasela kusukela ngiwumemezela kwaze kwaba sekugcineni. Kungijabulisile ukubona ukuthi singababhali isikhona enye indlela esingakhombisa ngayo imisebenzi yethu njengoba mina sengihlela ukuthi imidlalo ngiyibhale bese ngiyikhombisa ngale ndlela," kusho uChris. Uthe yena njengomuntu oneminyaka emkhakheni wokubhala imidlalo, akuqondayo ukuthi ababukeli bayayazi into abafuna ukuyibuka emizini yabo. "Yingakho ngabhala umdlalo ofana nalona okhombisa usizi abesifazane ababhekene nalo emizini yabo, ikakhulukazi emakhaya. "Iziteshi zethelevishini zithatha lokho ezikufunayo ngaleso sikhathi, lo mdlalo njengoba abantu bewubona uwulolu hlobo nje kwithelevishini ubungashintsha ube ngenye into kodwa mina ngiwulethe unjengoba unjalo ngoba ngazi ukuthi yimuphi umyalezio engifuna ukuwudlulisa. Ngiyakholelwa ekutheni ngelinye ilanga abantu abakhangisayo bayofinyelela kithi bese senza imali ngalokhu, njengoba ngalo mdlalo abalingisi ngibaholele ngemali yami," kusho yena. Uthe uyababonga kakhulu abalingisi asebenze nabo, nathemba ukuthi bazoqhubeka babambisane ukuya phambili.

author: Charles Khuzwayo
text: AYAPHELA amaphupho  kwabaqokwe kumaMetro FM Music Awards ase-ICC Arena eThekwini namuhla ngo-8 ebusuku. Le ndumezulu yomqhudelwano wezindondo izokhonjiswa bukhoma kuSABC 1 kusukela ngo-7.30 ebusuku njengoba kuzobe kuvela osaziwayo besahamba kukhaphethi omnyama. Angaphezu kuka-100 amaciko azobe edlana imilala eminxeni engu-21. Umunxa ozobe ubhekwe ngamehlo abomvu ngoweBest Song of The Year lapho kudlana khona imilala oSam Deep, Nia Pearl, Boohle & Mano – Shela, Dj Smallz, 031 Choppa & Uncool MC– Zep, Dj Maphorisa, Xduppy, Kabza De Small, Thatohatsi, Young Stunna & Nkosazana Daughter- Abantwana Bakho, Mawhoo, Gl ceejay, Jazzwrld & Thukuthela – Bengicela, Khadeair, Peekay Mzee & Kaytah – Magumba, Jazzwrld, Mawhoo, Thukuthela & Gl_ceejay – Uzizwa kanjani,Shandesh and Mvzzle – Sdudla or Slender,Goon Flavour, Master KG & Eemoh – Ngishutheni, uMafikizolo – Uzoncengwa unyoko noCiza, Jazzwrld & Thukuthela – Isaka. Kulo nyaka kuzobhekwa ukuthi iyiphi insizwa ezowina okokuqala emunxeni weBest Maskandi njengoba kuqhathwe Umafikizolo – Uzoncengwa Unyoko, Sminofu and Zee Nxumalo – Sajola Kamnandi, Mzukulu, Intombi yasoLundi – Ubu Ghost Bami, Khuzani – Umanikinikana noSiya Ntuli – Amaphiko. Umculi kamaskandi oshisa izikhotha kulezi zinsuku uNkeshemba, utholene phezulu noShandesh, Khadeair, Kharishma, Goon Flavour. Izintokazi zaseKZN uMawhoo noLwah Ndlunkulu zidudulana noLordkez, Zee Nxumalo noShandesh. UXolly Mncwango waseRichards Bay ubambene noNontokozo Mkhize, Musa Yende, Mmatema noNothando Hlophe. USam Deep ubhekene nenselelo emunxeni weBest Artist of The Year kuMaphorisa, Ciza,Shandesh noZee Nxumalo. UMawhoo angase aphume nesikhuni sivutha kwiBest Collaboration njengoba eqhathwe noSam Deep, Nia Pearl, Boohle and Mano – Shela, Jazzwrld, Mawhoo, Thukuthela and Gl_ceejay – Uzizwa Kanjani, Ladysmith Black Mambazo, Nduduzo Makhathini & Mbuso Khoza – You make me happy, Mawhoo, Gl ceejay, Jazzwrld & Thukuthela – Bengicela noGoon Favour, Master KG& Eemoh – Ngishutheni. *Kwenzeka lokho nje ziyabuya kwiMetro FM Music Awards Festival ePeople's Park eThekwini namhlanje kusukela ngo-2 ntambama. Kuzobe kusina kudedelana oYoung Stunna, Babalwa, DJ Tira, Lamiez Holworthy, Lerato Kganyango, Khuzani, Mthandeni, uMafikizolo, Big NUZ, Feza, Somizi Mhlongo, Zola Zee Loving, Skhinkily nabanye. *Kusasa ziyahephana kwiMetro FM Music Awards: Love Movement eBerea Rovers eThekwini kusukela ngo-12 emini. Kuzobe kunandisa uWilson B Nkosi, Paul Mtirara, Sentle Lehoko, Msizi Shembe, Naima Kay, Mondli Ngcobo, Naledi Aphiwe, Zamajobe, Nomfundo Moh, Nontokozo Mkhize, Lwah Ndlunkulu, Khutso Thiledi nabanye. *Kusasa ziyaphenduka kwiDubane Summer Break eShaka Marine World eThekwini kusukela ngo-9 ekuseni. Kuzobe kushiyelana  inkundla uGoldmax & Dankie Boi, Young Stunna, Blckie, Beast, Dladla Mshunqisi, Buko & DJ Sox, Loki, Louis Ribbs, and Tobzela,

author: Zimbili Vilakazi
text: USASHAQEKILE namanje umndeni wowesilisa waseThokazi, KwaNongoma, okuthiwa ushaywe womunye wesilisa ngequpha, washona, kubangwa eyokukora amagoli amaningi. Kulesi sigameko okuthiwa senzeke eMajomela, KwaNongoma, ngoLwesine olwedlule, kushone uMnuz Phumlani Dlamini (24). Ngokusho kukadadewabo, uNksz Qinisile Dlamini, isigameko senzeke sekuhlakazekwa emva kokuphela komdlalo umufi abeyidlala okuthiwa ibiphakathi kwesikole iMthombowesizwe High kanjalo neNongoma LoveLife Youth Centre. “Kuthiwa uhlaselwe abafana abambalwa okuthiwa wayekade exabane nabo ngempelasonto ende yokuqala kukaMeyi. Kuthiwa iqembu ayepikwe kulo, iMjiva yayikade idlala neqembu lalaba bafana esingalazi igama lalo, yena wase ekora amagoli ayisithupha,” kusho uNksz Dlamini. Uthe bezwa kuthiwa abasolwa ababediniwe yilawa amagoli, bazama ukumxakazisa khona lapho kodwa balanyulwa, kwahlukanwa. “Njengoba sebephinda bezomhlasela ngoLwesine. Ngosuku abulawe ngalo kuthiwa waqale washaywa ngoyedwa nenqindi, balanyulwa. Kuthe kusabhekwe lokho, waphinde washaywa owesibili, ngayo inqindi, wavele wawa, wadlikiza, wase ethula,” kusho uNksz Dlamini. Uthe umsolwa esebona ukuthi umlimazile umufi, wakhumula ibhande engalweni wamshaya ngalo. “Asazi noma wayesezama ukumvusa noma wayemqedela,” usho kanje. Uthe bayasola ukuthi ibhande elalifakwe umsolwa lalinomuthi onzima, owaholela ekutheni akwazi ukubulala umufi ngenqindi. "Kubuhlungu ngoba umfowethu ubengesiye umuntu wodlame. Ubekhonze ukuzihlekela futhi ezithandela ibhola. Indaba yokuthi aphume ekhaya eyodlala ibhola bese sifikelwa umyalezo wokuthi usebulewe enkundleni yemidlalo, isizwise ubuhlungu obukhulu,” kusho uNksz Dlamini. Uthe abakutholile ukuthi kwakudlalelwa isiteki, abangasazi ukuthi esamalini. Uthe umyalezo bawuthola ngomunye ayehambe naye ukuya ebholeni, kwathi uma befika, bathola sekufike namaphoyisa, eseqinisekisile ukuthi useshonile. UMphathiswa woMnyango wezokuThuthukiswa koMphakathi uNksz Mbali Shinga ubezovakashela umndeni kamufi izolo. Esitatimendeni esithunyelelwe abezindaba ukududuza umndeni, abangani nomphakathi waKwaNongoma, uNksz Shinga uzwakalise ukushaqeka nokuphatheka kabi ngesigameko. “Isigameko siyisikhumbuzo esibuhlungu sokuthi kufanele kugqugquzelwe indaba yokuxazulula ukungaboni ngaso linye ngendlela enokuthula ikakhulukazi kubantu abasha abazibandakanya kwezemidlalo,” kusho uNksz Shinga. Uthe ngale kokuyokhalisa umndeni kamufi, bazophinde bawuhlinzeke ngosizo lokwelulekwa ngokomqondo kulandela isigameko. Okhulumela amaphoyisa KwaZulu-Natal, uSergeant Thenjiswa Ngcobo, uthe amaphoyisa aKwaNongoma abophe owesilisa oneminyaka engu-19 ngecala lokubulala kulandela isigameko sokubulawa kowesilisa. “Ushaywe washona ngoMeyi 7, 2026 KwaMajomela,” kusho uSerg Ngcobo. Uthe umsolwa uvele eNkantolo yeMantshi yaKwaNongoma ngoMsombuluko.

author: Mthokozisi Mncuseni
text: UNOZINTI weKaizer Chiefs, uBrandon Petersen, usethubeni lokuthola indawo esikwatini seBafana Bafana esizodlala kwiNdebe yoMhlaba ngoJuni Image: Isithombe:BACKPAGEPIX SEKUFIKE isikhathi sokuthi umqeqeshi weBafana Bafana, uHugo Broos, ashintshe umqondo ngabadlali beKaizer Chiefs ngoba sebebaningi okunzima ukuziba ukuthi bafanelwe yindawo eqenjini eliya kwiNdebe yoMhlaba ezoba seCanada, Mexico nase-United States of America (USA) ngoJuni. Lona wumbono welinye lamabamba abaqeqeshi kwiChiefs, uKhalil Ben Youssef, awutshele abezindaba emuva kokubambana ngo 1-1 ne-Orlando Pirates emdlalweni wabakhaya ngempelasonto edlule. Ukuzitshwa nguBroos kwabadlali beChiefs kuba sematheni ngaso sonke isikhathi uma ezomemezela isikwati. Kuyaqapheleka nokho ukuthi ezikwatini ezimbili zalo mqeqeshi waseBelgium ezidlale kwi-Africa Cup of Nations (Afcon) bebengabonwa nangokhalo abadlali baMakhosi. Kwi-Afcon yaseMorocco uMduduzi Shabalala weChiefs wayekubadlali okwakucushwe ngabo. Yize ukushiya ngaphandle abadlali baMakhosi kumakhela inzondo kubalandeli baleli qembu laseNaturena kodwa uBroos ubengakufihli ukuthi isizathu sakhe wukuthi akamboni oseqophelweni lomhlaba kuleli qembu laseNaturena. Ngokusho kukaBroos ngesikhathi ememezela iBafana ngaphambi kwemidlalo yobungani nePanama ngenyanga edlule, unozinti weChiefs uBrandon Petersen ubesethubeni lokuthola indawo kulesi sikwati kodwa wasala ngaphandle ngenxa yokugula okuphoqe ukuthi ayohlizwa esibhedlela. Lo nozinti osekungumlando ukuthi usebuyele esikimini seChiefs, ugile izimanga kowabakhaya waze waqokwa njengomdlali ovelele. Okuhle ngalokhu wukuthi uPetersen ukwenze phambi kwakhe uBroos obesenkundleni. Emuva komdlalo uBen Youssef uthumele umyalezo kuBroos ethi akuyena uPetersen yedwa okufanele abheke ngakuyena kwiChiefs uma eseqoka isikwati seNdebe yoMhlaba ngoba bayangqongqoza oBradley Cross, Lebohang Maboe noThabiso Monyane. “Ngokwami bacela kwabahlanu abadlali beChiefs engibona kubafanele ukuthi bangene endizeni ebheke kwiNdebe yoMhlaba neBafana,” kusho uBen Youssef. “Kufanele ukuthi kuzoba yisinqumo okunzima ukusithatha kuBroos ngoba kwiChiefs iyodwa bane kumbe bahlanu okufanele bangasali kwiNdebe yoMhlaba. “Kasinawo amandla okuphikisa uBroos ngezizathu zakhe kodwa uPetersen ngokwami wayevele ekulungele ukuba yingxenye yeBafana engakaxinwa nawukugula. “Ngicabanga ukuthi yinto efanayo nakuCross, Maboe noMonyane kodwa siyamethemba umqeqeshi." IFifa inqume ukuthi izikwati zeNdebe yoMhlaba ezisazophundlwa zithunyelwe kuyona ngoMeyi 13. UBroos uzomemezela isikwati sabadlali abangu-55 emasontweni azayo. IFifa inqume ukuthi wonke amaqembu adedele abadlali ngoMeyi 26. NgoJuni 1 iFifa ilindele ukuthi wonke amaqembu ayinike uhla lwabadlali abangu-23 kuya ku-26 azodlala ngabo kwiNdebe yoMhlaba.

author: Simangaliso Ntshangase
text: UMENGAMELI weZwe uMnuz Cyril Ramaphosa INKANTOLO yoMthethosisekelo isinqume ukuthi umbiko wesinqumo seKomiti lePhalamende malungana nodaba lwePhala Phala kwakungekho emthethweni, nokuthi kusuka manje sekuthathwa ngokuthi yinto engekho, okusho ukuthi lolu daba sekumele ukuthi luyodingidwa kabusha ePhalamende. Leso sinqumo siphume ngoLwesihlanu ekuseni, futhi semukelwa ngamaqembu ehlukene ezepolitiki aphikisayo. Nokho umbuzo omkhulu ngothi kuzokwenzekani kusukela manje? INkantolo yoMthethosisekelo yethule izethulo ezintathu isusela ekutheni abeqembu i-Economic Freedom Party namanye amalungu esigungu ePhalsmende ayedlulisele lolu daba phambili ngoba engagculisekile ngesinqumo sokungatholi gcobho kulolu daba. Kuzokhumbuleka ukuthi iKomiti lePhalamende lalivote laphikisa umbiko wesigatshana somthetho u-Section 89, okwakukhalwa kulandelelwa kuwona malungana nodaba lokutholakala kwezishaqane zemali yakwamanye amazwe epulazini likaMengameli weZwe, uMnuz Cyril Ramaphosa - okwavela ukuthi ingxenye yayo yayebiwe ngo-2020. Njengoba sekunqunywe kanjena manje, kusho ukuthi lo mbiko walolu daba kuzophoqa ukuthi ubuyiselwe ePhalamende ukuthi kuzophenywa kabusha ngawo ukuze kutholakale ukuthi akubanga nagcobho yini malungana nalolu daba, futhi kubhekwe ukuthi asizukuba bikho yini isidingo sokuthi kushushiswe uRamaphosa malungana nalokhu. Isinqumo seNkantolo yoMthethosisekelo siphikisa isinqumo esaphuma ngoDisemba 2022, esakhishwa yiKomiti elalilawulwa ngamalungu e-African National Congress, abanquma ukuthi ukuthi kungalandelelwa umbiko wekomiti elizimele - owawuveze ukuthi kwakunobufakazi bokuthi uRamaphosa wephula umthetho ngokugcina le mali ngokungemthetho epulazini lakhe ngoFebhuwari wango-2020, okuvela ukuthi yayilinganiselwa ku-580 000 wamaDola aseMelika, okungaba ngaphezudlwana kuka-R9.4 million. Njengoba sekuphume lesi sinqumo seNkantolo yoMthethosisekelo, amalungu ePhalamende kuzomele ukuthi abuyele kulesi sigatshana somthetho u-Section 89, abheke nalowo mbiko - bese kuphenywa kabusha ukuze kuqinisekiswe ukuthi konke kulandeleka ngokusemthethweni. Leli komidi elizimele, eliholwa yiNhloko yamaJaji uSandile Ngcobo, yathola ngoNovemba wango-2022 ukuthi kwakunobufakazi bokuthi uRamaphosa wasebenzisa kabi amandla negunya analo ukuthi agcine le mali yakwelinye izwe epulazini lakhe, futhi wagunyaza nokuthi isetshenziswe ngasese ngale komngcele waleli zwe. Kanti manje izinto sezishintshe kakhulu uma uqhathaniswa nango-2022, njengoba ngaleso sikhathi iPhalamende lalilawulwa ngamalungu e-ANC, okusolakala ukuthi yiwona aqinisekisa ukuthi lolu daba luyacindezeleka. Kanti-ke manje kubhekwe ukubona ukuthi luzosingatheka kanjani njengoba seluzobe lwenganyelwe ngamalungu ohulumeni wokubusa ngokubambisana. Ngenkathi lolu daba lusaqhubeka, uRamaphosa wayelokhu emile kwelokuthi umsulwa kwasolelwa khona.

author: Sabelo Nsele
text: UMHOLI we-IFP, uMnuz Velenkosini Hlabisa Image: Leon Lestrade / Independent Media UMHOLI we-IFP, uMnuz Velenkosini Hlabisa, uthe ngeke baseseke isiphakamiso sokungabethembi ubuholi bukaMengameli Cyril Ramaphosa. UHlabisa uwachaze njengosomathuba amaqembu afake isiphakamiso sokungabethembi ubuholi bukaRamaphosa. Ukusho lokhu ngesikhathi ekhuluma nabeNewzroom Afrika. Amaqembu iMKP ne-ATM afake isiphakamiso sokungabethembi ubuholi bukaRamaphosa. UMENGAMELI Cyril Ramaphosa La maqembu afake isiphakamiso sokungabethembi ubuholi bukaRamaphosa emva kokuba iNkantolo yoMthethosisekelo ichithe isinqumo sePhalamende sokunqaba ukwamukela umbiko wethimba elalijutshwe ukuba liphenye ngokuntshontshwa kwezishaqane zamadola aseMelika epulazini likaRamaphosa. UHlabisa uthe asikho isidingo sokuthi kulalelwe isiphakamiso sokungabethembi ubuholi bukaRamaphosa, wathi kufanele kulandelwe imiyalelo yenkantolo. "Emva kwesinqumo senkantolo sakhipha isitatimende. Sikholwa wukuthi kufanele kulandelwe umthetho njengoba naye uRamaphosa eshilo ukuthi asihloniphe isinqumo senkantolo. IPhalamende kufanele lenze lokho okushiwo yisinqumo senkantolo. Akukuhle ukuba usomathuba. Asikho isidingo sesiphakamiso sokungabethembi ubuholi bukaRamaphosa. Kunesinqumo senkantolo esishoyo ukuthi yiluphi uhlelo okufanele lulandelwe. Thina njenge-IFP asibona abantu abathanda ukubukwa. Siyavumelana ngokuthi kufanele kulandelwe imiyalelo yenkantolo." USomlomo wePhalamende, uNkk Thoko Didiza, ubengakasiphenduli isicelo se-MKP nese-ATM. Phezu kwesicelo se-MKP ne-ATM kuphinde kube nesicelo se-EFF efuna ukuthi iPhalamende lisungule ngokushesha ikomiti elizoqhuba uhlelo lokukhipha uRamaphosa esikhundleni. Umholi we-EFF, uMnuz Julius Malema, uthe uRamaphosa uzolahlekelwa okuningi uma ekhishwa esikhundleni ngohlelo abaluhlongozayo. "Uma ukhishwa ngalolu hlelo ulahlekelwa imihlomulo etholwa ababengomengameli. Lapha sibala impesheni, izimoto kanye nabasebenzi onikezwa bona uma usuthatha umhlalaphansi." UMalema uthe bazolwa nemizamo kaRamaphosa yokubambezela uhlelo lokuthi akhishwe esikhundleni. Kuvela ukuthi uRamaphosa angase aye enkantolo eyophonsela inselelo umbiko wekomiti elalijutshwe yiPhalamende ukuba liphenye lolu daba. "Noma angaya enkantolo sizoya nathi enkantolo. Sizothi lolu daba luyaphuthuma, alulalelwe ngokushesha. Uma ecabanga ukuthi uzosibambezela, uqambe eshilo. Sizofaka isicelo sokuthi udaba lulalelwe ngokushesha. Uzobizwa ukuba azoziphendulela." Ukuze uRamaphosa akhishwe esikhundleni ngalolu hlelo kufanele isiphakamiso sivotelwe u-66% wamalungu ePhalamende. UMHOLI we-EFF, uMnuz Julius Malema UMalema uthe abanandaba noma singachithwa ekugcineni isiphakamiso sokuthi uRamaphosa akhishwe esikhundleni ngoba bazobe sebemhlambalaze bamqeda ngesikhathi evele phambi kwekomiti elizobe liqhuba uhlelo lokuthi akhishwe esikhundleni. "Asinandaba nokuthi uyakhishwa yini esikhundleni. Indaba yokuvota isekugcineni. Kuyothi kufikwa lapho uRamaphosa uyobe esehlambalazeke waphela. Kuningi okuzovela. Sizombiza ezoziphendulela sibize nabasebenzi basepulazini. Kuningi okuzovela. Abasebenzi bazositshela iqiniso. Ngiyazi ukuthi kwakungekhona okokuqala bentshontsha imali lapha. Maningi amagama abantu abazovela. Uzombuleka izinqe."

author: Mthokozisi Mncuseni
text: UMDLALI wasemuva weBafana Bafana, uKhulumani Ndamane, owenze amaphutha amabili aholele ekutheni kungene amagoli ngesikhathi bebhekene neSiwelele FC ngempelasonto edlule Image: Isithombe:BACKPAGEPIX NAKUBA umqeqeshi weMamelodi Sundowns, uMiguel Cardoso, evuma ukuthi kawazibeki amaphutha akamuva kaKhulumani Ndamane kodwa ngeke ayeke ukusibophela lesi sitobha ngoba yisona sodwa angakwazi ukusisebenzisa kulezi zinsuku. ISundowns izosonga isizini yeBetway Premiership namuhla ngokubhekana ne-TS Galaxy ngo-7.30 ebusuku, eMbombela Stadium, eNelspruit. Iwini yeSundowns kwiGalaxy izoyigcina esicongweni ngamaphuzu amagu-71, bese konke kulala kwi-Orlando Pirates yona ezosalelwa ngemibili. IPirates enamaphuzu angu-65 endaweni yesibili, izoqala umdlalo wayo neDurban City ngoMgqibelo ekhaya, seyikuqonda kahle ekudingayo ukuze iqede indlala yeminyaka engu-14 yesicoco seligi. Ngesikhathi ekhuluma nabezindaba emuva kokunqoba kweSundowns ngo 7-4 kwiSiwelele ngempelasonto, uCardoso uvumile ukuthi uNdamane wenza amaphutha asobala kulezi zinsuku. Kumagoli amane ashaywe yiSiwelele abukeka ezoba wusizo kwiPirates, uNdamane wenze amaphutha amabili lapho ephasele khona isitha kwangena amagoli amabili. Ngaphambi kwalokho, udale iphenathi sekuyophela umdlalo ngesikhathi bembambana ngo 1-1 neStellies. “Okusobala ngoNdamane ngukuthi ukhombisa izimpawu zokukhathala hhayi emzimbeni kuphela kepha nasemqondweni okwenza kube sengathi usalela emuva uma kufanele enze lokhu akujwayele,” kusho uCardoso. “Inkinga esinayo ngukuthi nguyena kuphela isitobha esikhona kwezamaphakathi nenkundla esikwazi ukudlala ngonyawo lwesinxele." Nakuba uCardoso emvikela uNdamane kodwa kungenzeka ukuthi amaphutha akamuva amlahlekisele ngengqayizivele yethuba lokuyodlala kwiNdebe yoMhlaba. UNdamane ngomunye wabadlali okubhekwe ukuthi bathole indawo esikwatini seBafana Bafana sabadlali ababalelwa ku-55 umqeqeshi, uHugo Broos, azoqoka kubona esezoya kwiNdebe yoMhlaba obekulindeleke ukuthi sihanjiswe kwiFifa. Izolo bekuwusuku lokugcina lwamaqembu esizwe lokuhambisa kwiFifa lolu hlwa lwabadlali okuthiwa kufanele lube nonozinti okungenani abane. Okusemqoka ngalolu hla wukuthi akekho umdlali ongekho kulona ozoqhamuka esefakwa kweseNdebe yoMhlaba ngisho ngabe kukhona abalimalayo kulelo qemu lesizwe. NgoMeyi 25, amaqembu ayaphoqwa ukuba adedele abadlali bawo abasemaqenjini esizwe aya kwiNdebe yoMhlaba eCanada, Mexico nase-United States of America (USA). Lolu suku seluyolandelwa nguJuni 1 noma 2 lapho iFifa iyomemezela khona wonke amaqembu esizwe abadlali abangu-23.

author: Charles Khuzwayo
text: NGAPHAMBI kokuba ingqalabutho yomlingisi, uCynthia Shange, idlule emhlabeni yakuveza ngo-2024, ukuthi kwake kwambulwa kwembeswa kuyo ngenxa yesifo sikashukela kangangoba yaze yanqanyulwa izinzwane. UCynthia (76), oshonele kwesinye sezibhedlela zaseKZN, ngezintathakusa zangoMsombuluko, emuva kokugula, wazisholo yena ukuthi wasizwa uShembe lesi sifo sifuna ukumjuqa ngalowo nyaka. Umufi wadalula ukuthi uphethwe yisifo sikashukela ngesikhathi ehlonishwa ngendondo ye-Lifetime Achievement kumaSimon Mabhunu Sabela TV and Film Awards eThekwini, ngoJulayi 2024. Wathi lesi sifo saqala ukumxina ngo-2018, kangangoba wagcina esegqigqa esibhedlela futhi nodokotela baze bafuna nokumnqamula umlenze. "Bengizokwamukela lo mklomelo ngiqhutshwa ngenqola kodwa ngibonga umusa kaNkulunkulu," esho ngo-2024. Wathi waze wasizwa ukuqambela odokotela amanga ukuze anganqanyulwa umlenze. "Ngo-2018, ngesikhathi ngisuka eGoli ngiya eThekwini, ngaba nokugula okwangenza ngalaliswa esibhedlela izinyanga ezintathu. Kwakunzima ngiphakathi kokuphila nokufa. Ngibonga uShembe ngokusindisa impilo yami sengiphelelwe yithemba. Ngasenga ezimithiyo ngokubatshela ukuthi kunesivumelwano engisenzile sokuqopha ifilimu, esingangenza ngihlawuliswe u-R5 million uma ngisephula. Bafonela indodakazi yami ukuba izosayina amafomu ukuze nginikezwe ama-antibiotics." Esikhundleni sokunqanyulwa umlenze, uCynthia wathi wagcina enqanyulwe izinzwane onyaweni. UCynthia odabuka eLamontville, waba ngunobuhle wokuqala omnyama kuleli ukumela iNingizimu Afrika ku-Miss World eLondon, ngo-1972. Wathola le ngqayizivele yethuba emuva kokuhlabana ngesicoco sikaMiss Black South Africa ngenxa yokuthi ngezikhathi zobandlululo abantu abamnyama babengavunyelwe ukuqhudelana nezinye izinhlanga. Nakhona ku-Miss World waphuma endaweni yesihlanu, okwenza amantombazane amnyama aba nogqozi nofuqufuqu lokungenela imiqhudelwano yonobuhle kusukela ngo-1992.
