Akugcinanga lapho, uCynthia uqhubekile nokuvelela endimeni yezokungcebeleka njengoba waba wumlingisi oqavile efilimini yokuqala ende yesiZulu eyayithi uDeliwe, lapho uCynthia ayelingisa khona noSimon Mabhunu Sabela, Ndaba Mhlongo, Sydney Chama, Roland Mqwebu, Patience Africa, Maurel Msimang, June Buthelezi, Joe Mafela nabanye abaningi. Kusukela lapho, akabange esabheka emuva njengoba wadlulela efilimini esihloko sithi Isivumelwano. Wadlala indawo kaMkabayi emdlalweni ozigcawugcawu wethelevishini uShaka Zulu. Emuva kwalokho, walingisa emdlalweni owuchungechunge kaDuma Ndlovu uMuvhango, lapho ayelingisa khona indawo kaMaButhelezi unina kaThandaza (Sindi Dlathu). Ngenxa yeqhaza lakhe emkhakheni wezokulingisa, uCynthia uhlonishwe ngomklomelo we-Lifetime Achievement kuma-South African Film and TV Awards (Saftas) nakuma-Simon Mabhunu Sabela TV and Film Awards. Ushiye emhlabeni amadodakazi akhe uSihle nosaziwayo wethelevishini uNonhle Thema namadodana u-Ayanda noBanele Thema nabazukulu nesizukulwane. Ngokwesitatimende somndeni, imininingwane ngezinhlelo zomngcwabo isazomenyezelwa. U-CYNTHIA Shange ewina isicoco sikaMiss Black South Africa ngeminyaka yo-1970s UNDABA Mhlongo ephethe into enesithombe sikaCynthia Shange kuSivumelwano U-CYNTHIA Shange emele iNingizimu Afrika ngo-1972 U-CYNTHIA Shange elingisa noSindi Dlathu kuMuvhango U-CYNTHIA Shange mhlazane ehlonishwa ngomklomelo we-Lifetime Achievement U-CYNTHIA SHANGE noNONHLE THEMA

author: Charles Khuzwayo
text: KUZOQOPHEKA umlando  emcimbini walo nyaka wedili lomculo wokholo iMayine Gospel Experience njengoba izithameli zizodumisa zifake ama-earphone ezindlebeni. Le ndumezulu ebizwa nge-Silent Worship Experience: A Night of Song and Worship izoba se-DCC Jesus Dome eThekwini ngoMeyi 22. Kubaculi abazobe besina bededelana kubalwa u-Oncemoresix, Khaya Mthethwa, Ncebakazi Msomi, Ntokozo Mbambo, Lusanda Beja noMpumi Mtsweni. UKwezi Ndlovu-Mbambo, osethimbeni labahleli balo mcimbi, uveze ukuthi bahlele into engakaze ibonakale njengoba abazobe bekhona bonke bezonikwa ama-earphone ukuze ulalele lonke uhlelo lomcimbi nokuyindlela abafuna umuntu asondelane ngayo noThixo njengoba kuzobe kugcwele umculo nomkhuleko. "Sihlele ukuthi umcimbi siwenze ngendlela engakaze ibonakale kuleli. Abantu abazoba khona sifuna basondelane noNkulunkulu ngokubanika isikhathi somuntu ngamunye. Izingoma zonke nezintshumaelko abantu bazozizwa ngalokhu abazobe bekufake emadlebeni nokuyinto esifuna umuntu ngamunye asondelane nomdali wakhe," kusho uKwezi. Uthe abaculi abazobe bekhona bonke ngeke bagcine nje ngokucula kuphela kodwa bazophinde bashumayele. Amathikithi okuthamela lo mcimbi aseyatholakala eWebtickets nasePick n Pay ngoR250. I-DCC Jesus Dome ku-39 Garth Road eMayville, eThekwini.

author: Zakhele Xaba
text: UMQEQESHI we-Orlando Pirates kwiDStv Diski Challenge, uRoscoe Krieling, ejabula nomdlali wasemuva uJabu Mokone emuva kokuwina iligi ngempelasonto edlule Image: Isithombe:BACKPAGEPIX 'I-ORLANDO Pirates ingaba nenqanawe yenkulisa uma inganquma ukuyivusa.' Lawa ngamazwi omqeqeshi weqembu leZimnyama elingompetha beDStv Diski Challenge, uRoscoe Krieling, oqophe umlando ngokuphakamisa le ndebe okokuqala selokhu le ligi yasungulwa ngo-2014. IPirates yehlule iSundowns ngo 2-0 emdlalweni wokugcina wesizini eDobsonville Stadium, eSoweto, ngempelasonto. Kulindeleke ukuthi leli qembu liyodlala phesheya kwezilwandle okuwuhambo oluhambisana nokuba ngompetha beDiski. EZimnyama zihlale esicongweni se-log amasonto angu-21. Eminyakeni edlule, iPirates ibihlala esicongweni kodwa igcine igudluziwe. IPirates idla umhlanganiso kwiDiski nje, ayisenayo inkulisa kwazise yavalwa eminyakeni edlule kulandela izinsolo zokukokotela iminyaka kwabadlali. Abadlali abayibamba kwiDiski bathungathwa njalo ngaphambi kokuqala kwesizini. IKaizer Chiefs neMamelodi Sundowns ngamanye amaqembu ashaya ngabadlali abakhuliswe ezinkulisa zawo. UKrieling owayeyiphini likaThabo Septhemba ngesikhathi bewina iligi yeDiski ngo-2023, uncome umsebenzi weqembu namalungiselelo esizini aseqophelweni. "Lokhu kuwuphumela wokuhlela izinto okwenziwa ngaphambi kokufika kwami eqenjini. Ngesonto lami lokuqala ngicabanga ukuthi kwakunabadlali abangu-45 engabahlola. Nganikwa umbandela wokuhlanganisa iqembu. Ngalehlisa ngasala nabadlali abangu-29, sasayinisa ababili phakathi nesizini sagcina sesinabangu-31. "Ngesikhathi ngilungiselela ukuqala kwesizini, abaningi abadlali babengakaze bakwenze lokho ngendlela engenza ngayo. Babemangele. Sasingagijimi kodwa kwakusebenza ibhola kakhulu. Ngabatshela ukuthi nizokhumbula ukuthi nanikhala silungiselela isizini, senithi siyiqembu eliqine kunawo wonke kule ligi. Ngingasho ukuthi bekunjalo, besiqine kunawo wonke amaqembu. Iqembu lisengakwazi ukuthi ukukhula. Ngicabanga ukuthi iPirates ingabumba enye yezinkulisa eziqinile eMzansi," kusho uKriel. "Noma ngabe iqembu likhetha ukwenzani. Ngisebenzela iqembu futhi ngingathanda ukuhlala. Njengomqeqeshi ngiyafisa inselelo yokuqeqesha esigabeni esiphezulu. Kodwa ngiyakwazi ukubekezela. Engikudingayo yikhefu neholidi, kuningi engikwenzele iqembu."

author: Fanelesibonge Bengu
text: Osaziwayo benhlangano Imvelo Social Development NPC. Kusuka kwesokunxele uMenzi Biyela, Thembinkosi Thwala, Swazi Mokoena, Ndumiso Dlamini noShon G AFONGQE isigqoko acela uxhaso kunoma wubani ongawasiza amaciko aqhuba umkhankaso wokuqwashisa ngezihlava ezihlukene ezihlasele abantu abasha nokufundisa ngamakhono. La maciko anenhlangano ebizwa ngokuthi Imvelo Social Development NPC. Usihlalo wayo umlingisi woZalo uThembinkosi Thwala, isekela lakhe umrepha uMpumelelo "Shon G" Gumbi, unobhala jikelele umlingisi uNdumiso Dlamini kuthi uzakwabo ekulingiseni uSwazi Mokoena abe yiphini lakhe bese kuba nomlingisi uMenzi Biyela ongumgcinimafa. UMenzi, ongumsunguli wenhlangano, uthe ukukhwabanisa nenkohlakalo okwenzeka kuhulumeni yikho okwenza imali iphelele ezandleni igcine ingafinyeleli lapho idingeka khona kakhulu. "Sicela uhulumeni nezinkampani ezizimele bafake isandla kwesikwenzayo ukuzei abantu abasha babe nekusasa eliqhakazile. Asiceli kuhulumeni kuphela kodwa noma ngabe uyinkinsela enoshisanyama KwaMashu ungasixhasa," kusho uMenzi olingise emidlalweni eminingi okubalwa kuyo iThonga, Uzalo neminye. Uthe nyakenye baqale uhlelo lokuhambela ejele iWestville beyohlomisa iziboshwa ngamakhono kwezokulingisa, ukucula, nokuqondisa imidlalo. Uthe baqale ngephakethe labo kodwa bathola uxhaso lwabe-Arts and Living Cultures ukuze baqhubeke kuze kube wuMashi. Udalule ukuthi sebentula imali yokwenza umcimbi lapho iziboshwa abaziqeqeshile zizokhombisa khona ezikufundile. Ngesikhathi besalinde lokho,uMenzi uthe sebehambela izikole beqwashisa ngobubhoklolo, ukuhlukumeza ngokobulili, ukusetshenziswa kwezidakamizwa nokunye. Uthe sebehambele izikole abale kuzo iChesterville High School, Thokozamnganga High School eShongweni nePhambili High School eSeaview. NgoMsombuluko bazoya eManzibomvu Primary School nasoZabeni Primary School. "Sizohambela izikole ezingu-14 ezifake umnikelo zithi ziyakuthanda esikwenzayo zicela sifinyelele nakuzona. Akwenzeki mahhala esikwenzayo ngoba kumele sihlele okokuhamba nendawo yokulala." Udalule ukuthi bafuna ukubuyisa ezemidlalo ezikoleni ukuze abafundi babe nabakwenzayo bangachithi isizungu ngezidakamizwa. Uthe bafuna nokuthatha ama-theatre angasanakiwe eThekwini bawasebenzise ukuze intsha izicijwe ngamakhono.

author: Nokubongwa Phenyane
text: UMETHULI wezinhlelo uNimrod Nkosi usebonge ukwesekwa kusabalala ingxoxo ayenayo nozakwabo ekhala ngokungasebenzi USEPHUMELE obala wabonga ukuxhaswa abantu bezwelana naye ngemuva kokusabalala kwenkulumo-ngxoxo ayenayo nomunye uzakwabo umlingisi obuye abe ngumethuli wezinhlelo uNimrod Nkosi. UNimrod kule nkulumo ubezwakala ekhala futhi ecela umsebenzi nokuyinto eyashiya abantu bakuleli bekhungathekile ngendima yezokungcebeleka. Wayeveza ubunzima obukule ndima yize eneminyaka engaphezu kuka-20 egxile kuyo. Kule ngxoxo wayethi uvula isifuba komunye umuntu wesilisa ukuze kube khona omlalelayo njengoba ekulesi simo esinzima sokungasebenzi. “Ngizinikele ngakho konke enginakho kule ndima, kodwa manje ngibona futhi konke kungilahlekela ngenxa yokungatholi amathuba omsebenzi. Ngibona ukuthi ake ngikhulume nomunye umuntu ngoba sengithule isikhathi eside, sekwanele,” kusho uNimrod. Muva nje uveze ukuthi ubonile abantu bekhathazeka sekusabalale le nkulumo kodwa angakusho wukuthi ngokwempilo uyaphila. “Ngiyabonga kubona bonke abantu abangithintile emva kokuba kusabalale le nkulumo ngenxa yokukhathazeka kwabo, bakhombisa ukungeseka. Ngithanda ukuniqinisekisa ukuthi mina nomndeni senza kahle kakhulu. Ngikhethe ukuthi ngalolu daba ngingabheki okubi kuphela. Abanye abantu bakhulume abakuthandayo, kodwa ngabheka okuhle ngalesi simo. Ngibonga nalabo abavikele isithunzi sami kuzona zonke izinkulumo ebezivela,” kusho yena. Uthe ukubona abantu bememeza bethi akathole umsebenzi njengoba esezikhalele kusho lukhulu kuye futhi uyathemba ukuthi maduzane abantu bazombona elapho bemfisela ukuthi abe khona. Lo mlingisi kulezi zinsuku ubonakala elingisa emdlalweni iLaw, Love & Betrayal nalapho alingisa khona indawo ephambili. Ukuphumela obala kwabalingisi, abaculi namanye amaciko kuleli bekhala ngezinkinga sekuyinto ejwayelekile njengoba ngisho uRami Chuene, emesekile uNimrod wathi lokhu akwenzayo kuyindlela engcono kunokuthi afele ngaphakathi njengoba besemkhakheni onzima.

author: Zakhele Xaba
text: U-ABDESLAM Ouadoou ongumqeqeshi we-Orlando Pirates, uzothembela kubafana bakhe ukuthi bahlule iDurban City emdlalweni weBetway Premiership e-Orlando Amstel Arena, eSoweto, namuhla ukuze ezongena emlandweni Image: Isithombe:BACKPAGEPIX UMQEQESHI we-Orlando Pirates, u-Abdeslam Ouaddou, usethubeni lokungena emlandweni okhethekile kuleli qembu uma enqoba isicoco seBetway Premiership. IPirates izobhekana neDurban City emdlalweni owandulela owokugcina wePremiership e-Orlando Amstel Arena, eSoweto, namuhla ngo-3 ntambama. Owokusonga isizini izowudlala ne-Orbit College eMbombela Stadium, eMpumalanga, ngoMeyi 23. EZimnyama zidinga ukwehlula iCity ukuze zizochonywa uphaphe lwegwalagwala. Zagcina ngesizini ka-2011/2012 ukuba ngompetha bwePremiership beqeqeshwa ngu-Augusto Palacios wasePeru owanikwa umsebenzi sekuyophela isizini. Lesi sicoco zasisheba nendebe yeMTN8 neyeTelkom Knockout. IPirates yayikwenzile lokhu ngesizini ka-2010/2011 iqeqeshwa nguRuud Krol waseNetherlands. Lokhu kusho ukuthi nakulokhu zinethuba lokudla izindebe ezintathu ngesizini kwazise sezifake ekhabetheni indebe yeMTN8 neyeCarling Knockout. U-Ouaddou waseMorocco usethubeni lokuzifaka emlandweni wokuba ngumqeqeshi wesibili wasezwenikazi, i-Afrika (ngaphandle kowaseMzansi), ozowina isicoco seligi nePirates kusukela kwasungulwa iPremier Soccer League (PSL) ngo-1996. Uma engasiphakamisa, uzolandela ezinyathelweni zikaRoy Barreto waseZimbabwe owasiwina neZimnyama esuka kwiQwaqwa Stars ngesizini ka-2002/2003. Uzoba ngumqeqeshi wesihlanu emlandweni weZimnyama owine isicoco seligi okukhona kubona uPalacios, Krol, Barreto no-Gordon Igesund owasiwina ngesizini ka-2000/2001. Ngaphezu kwalokho, uzongena emlandweni wokuba ngumqeqeshi wesibili onqobe iligi kwiPirates ngesizini yakhe yokuqala okuyinto eyenziwa nguBarreto kuphela kusukela kwasungulwa iPSL. Abukho ubufakazi bokuthi u-Ouaddou uyawazi umlando angase angene kuwona uma abafana bakhe bengaqeda ngeCity namuhla kodwa uchithe isonto lonke egcizelela ubumqoka bokungabhiyozi umsebenzi ungakapheli. Iqiniso wukuthi kunemizuzu engu-90 okufanalele bayidlale e-Orlando ezobe ingcwele ichichima kwazise amathikithi adayiswe aphela. Imidlalo yeBetway Premiership Namuhla ngo-3 ntambama: AmaZulu v Kaizer Chiefs (Moses Mabhida Stadium); Chippa United v Golden Arrows (Nelson Mandela Bay Stadium); Orlando Pirates v Durban City (Orlando Amstel Arena); Polokwane City v Marumo Gallants (Old Peter Mokaba Stadium); Richards Bay v Sekhukhune United (Mhlathuze Sports Complex); Siwelele v Magesi FC (Dr Petrus Molemela Stadium); Stellenbosh FC v Orbit College (Danie Craven Stadium)

author: Sabelo Nsele
text: KUMISWE uSihlalo we-IFP Youth Brigade (IFPYB) KwaZulu-Natal, ozwakala engxoxweni eqoshiwe ephehla udlame, uMnuz Mncedisi Maphisa. UMaphisa umiswe nelungu le-IFP, uNksz Lindi Ndlovu, elizwakala kule nkulumo lithi ngeke lisifake isikibha esinobuso bomholi weqembu, uMnuz Velenkosini Hlabisa. UMaphisa uyilungu lesiShayamthetho saKwaZulu-Natal futhi uke waba imeya kaMasipala wasebaQulusini, ekubeni uNksz Ndlovu, yena usebenza kumasipala ophethwe yi-IFP. Isinqumo sokumisa uMaphisa noNksz Ndlovu sithathwe emhlanganweni oyisipesheli wesigungu esiphezulu kwi-IFP obizwe emva kokusabalala kwayo. Okhulumela i-IFP, uMnuz Mkhuleko Hlengwa, uthe isigungu esiphezulu sithathe isinqumo sokumisa uMaphisa noNksz Ndlovu emva kokuba uMaphisa evumile ukuthi nguyena okhuluma kule ngxoxo eqoshiwe. UHlengwa uthe uMaphisa noNksz Ndlovu bazoqondiswa ubugwegwe. "UMaphisa umiswe kuzo zonke izikhundla okubalwa kuzo ukuba uSihlalo we-IFPYB KwaZulu-Natal nokuba ilungu loMkhandlu kaZwelonke kwi-IFP. Uzomiswa esikhundleni kuze kube udaba lwakhe lulalelwa uMkhandlu kaZwelonke. UNksz Ndlovu umisiwe kuzo zonke izinto ezithinta iqembu, akavumelekile ukuba abe yingxenye yezinto ezithinta iqembu kuze kuba kuphuma isinqumo ohlelweni lwakhe lokuqondiswa ubugwegwe lulalelwa uMkhandlu kaZwelonke." UHlengwa uthe isigungu esiphezulu sizoqhubeka nokuphenya lolu daba, bese sethula umbiko ogcwele emhlanganweni woMkhandlu kaZwelonke. "I-IFP ixwayisa abaholi bayo, amalungu nezinhlaka zeqembu ukuba bagweme ukwenza izinkulumo ezidala ezibudedengu, ezifaka iqembu ehlazweni nezidala uqhekeko eqenjini. Ubuholi be-IFP buzokwenza isiqiniseko sokuthi iyalandelwa yonke imigomo yeqembu." UMaphisa noNksz Ndlovu bangene obishini emva kokuba kusabalale inkulumo eqoshiwe lapho kuzwakala khona bekhuluma ngezimpi zangaphakathi kwi-IFP. Kule nkulumo kuzwakala uNksz Ndlovu ekhalaza kuMaphisa ukuthi abantu abasohlangothini lwabo bayavinjwa uma kunemihlangano yokugcoba amaziko. UMaphisa uphendula ngokuthi uNksz Ndlovu nabanye abasohlangothini lwabo akufanele bavume ukudlala abantu abasohlangothini ababanga nalo. UMaphisa uzwakala ethi abasohlangothini lwabo kufanele bashaye abasohlangothini oluphikisayo emihlanganweni yokugcotshwa kwamaziko okuvinjwa kuyo abasohlangothini abahambisana nalo. Uma iqhubeka inkulumo kuzwakala uNksz Ndlovu ethi kade ayenikwa izikibha ezinobuso bomuntu ambize ngalo baba, nokukholakala ukuthi ubesho izikibha ezinobuso bukaHlabisa. UNksz Ndlovu uzwakala ethi yena ngeke azigqoke izikibha ezinobuso "balo baba". Amalungu e-IFP asanda kuvunyelwa ukuba agqoke izikibha ezinobuso bukaHlabisa. Phambilini, bekuvumeleke izikibha ezinobuso bomsunguli weqembu, Inkosi Mangosuthu Buthelezi.

author: Sibusiso Mdlalose
text: Isithombe I-CAPE Town City ezibeke ethubeni elihle lokuzibekisela indawo kuma-PSL Promotion Play-Offs ngokushaya iBaroka FC ngo 1-0 emdlalweni weMotsepe Foundation Championship e-Athlone Stadium, eKapa, izolo ntambama I-CAPE Town City izibeke ethubeni elihle lokuzibekisela indawo kuma-PSL Promotion Play-Offs ngokushaya iBaroka FC emdlalweni weMotsepe Foundation Championship obudlalelwa e-Athlone Stadium eKapa, izolo ntambama. Igoli likaGabriel Amato elingene ngesiwombe sokuqala ngomzuzu ka-22 yilona eliqinisekise amaphuzu amathathu amqoka kuleli qembu laseKapa elisemshikashikeni wokuzabalazela ukubuyela esigabeni seBetway Premiership. Njengoba iKruger United isilinde isilinde umdlalo wayo wokugcina wokusonga isizini ngeSonto elizayo, ukugcotshwa ngokusemthethweni njengompetha beMotsepe Championship, umbango usuphakathi kweCity, Milford FC, Hungry Lions neCasric Stars, ukulwela indawo kumaPlay-Offs. Womathathu la maqembu asembangweni wokuzibekisela indawo kumaPlay-Offs abuye namaphuzu aphelele, njengoba iMilford ishaye i-University of Pretoria ngo 2-0 eMhlathuze Sports Complex, eRichard Bay, ngenkathi iHungry Lions inenebula iHighbury FC ngo 4-0 eNelson Mandela Bay Stadium, eGqeberh. Kwathi iCasric yabhaxabula i-Upington City ngo 2-0 eMxolisi Dicky Jacobs Stadium, e-Upington. Amaqembu amabili azoqeda endaweni yesibili neyesithathu azodlala neliqede endaweni ka-15 kwi-lo yePremiership. IMilford isendaweni yesibili ngamaphuzu awu-53, ilandelwa yiCity endaweni yesithathu neyesine ngamaphuzu awu-51 ngokulinganayo ngokwehlukana, kube yiCasric kweyesihlanu ngawu-49 Lokhu kusho ukuthi imidlalo yangeSonto elizayo, ngekawafawafa kula maqembu alwela ukuya kumaPlay-Offs. I-The Citizens eqeqeshwa uJan Vreman negqishe ngeningi labadlali abanamava okudlala kwiPremiership, izosonga isizini ngomdlalo wasekuhambeni neLeicesterford City ngeSonto, eDobsonville Stadium, eSoweto. IMilford eqeqeshwa uXanti Pupuma isonga isizini ngomdlalo wasekuhambeni neHungry Lions, eMxolisi Dicky Jacobs, e-Upington, iCasric isonge neGomora United eSolomon Mahlangu Stadium, KwaMhlanga. Kanti iKruger eshaye iGomora ngo 1-0 izolo, izosonga ngomdlalo wasekhaya ne-The Bees FC KaNyamazane Stadium, nokuyilapho ezobe isinikwa khona indebe yayo yeMotsepe Championship. Kanti ngakolunye uhlangothi, isifundazwe iLimpopo sikhungethwe yifu elimnyama njengoba womabili amaqembu amabili akulesi sifundazwe egawulwe yizembe, okuyiBaroka FC neBlack Leopards. Phezu kokunqoba kweLeopards ngo 2-1 ishaya iVenda FC izolo, eThohoyandou Stadium kodwa lokho akuyisizanga ngenxa yesibalo samaphuzu. Imiphumela yeMotsepe Foundation Championship: The Bees 1-1 Leicesterford City; Black Leopards 2-1 Venda FC; Cape Town City 1-0 Baroka; Upington City 0-2 Casric Stars; Highbury 0-4 Hungry Lions; Milford FC 2-0 Univ. of Pretoria; Gomora 0-1 Kruger United; Midlands Wanderers 1-1 Lerumo Lions

author: Sibusiso Mdlalose
text: Isithombe INSEPHE yaseNingizimu Afrika ka-400m, uZakithi Nene, owenze ezibukwayo eqopha irekhodi elisha lika-400m emjahweni wase-Italy, iPegaso Meeting, ngempelasonto INSEPHE ka-400m yaseNingizimu Afrika, uZakithi Nene, yenze ezibukwayo iqopha irekhodi elisha lika-400m kwabesilisa emjahweni i-Pegaso Meeting, eStadio Luigi Ridolfi, eFlorence, e-Italy, ngempelasonto. Uqophe isikhathi esiwu-44.44 seconds, eshiya uLapo Bianciardi wase-Italy, olale isibili ngesikhathi esiwu-46.01. UNene (28) odabuka eMnambithi, ukhipha unyawo kulo mjaho wase-Italy nje, akukapholi maseko ebambe iqhaza empumelelweni yeqembu laseNingizimu Afrika lika-4x400 le-relay elibuye nendondo yesiliva kowe-World Athletics Relays, eGaborone, eBotswana, ngoMeyi 3. “I-Italy inendawo ekhethekile enhliziyweni yami. Ngaqala khona lapha e-Italy ukugijima kwiDiamond League ngo-2021, eFlorence. Ngiyayijabulela imijaho yase-Italy ngenxa yomoya nokwesekwa okuqhamuka ezibukelini zakhona. Ngizizwa ngisefomini eyisimanga kusukela ngaqala ukugijima. Ngifuna ukuqhubeka ngigijime ngenze isikhathi esingaphakathi kuka-45 seconds ukuze ngikwazi ukuqhudelana nabagijimi abasezingeni eliphezulu emhlabeni,” kusho uNene, ecashunwa yi-WorldAthletics.com UNene ovutha engabaselwe kusukela kuqala u-2026, ngo-Ephreli udle umhlanganiso ku-400m emjahweni iKip Keino Classic, eNairobi, eKenya, ngesikhathi esiwu-44.50. Kanti nyakenye uqophe isikhathi sakhe (PB) esiwu-43.76 ethatha indawo yesihlanu kowe-World Athletics Ultimate Championships, eTokyo, eJapan. Ungomunye wezibabuli zabagijimi iNingizimu Afrika ezothembela kubona ekwenzeni kahle komunye umqhudelwano we-World Athletics Ultimate Championships, ozobanjelwa eBudapest, eHungary, ngoSepthemba. Khonamanjalo: Umjaho i-Absa Run Your City 10km uhlehlisiwe ngenxa yesimo sezulu esingesihle esifundazweni iWestern Cape. Lo mjaho womlenze wesibili webanga lika-10km obekulindeleke ubanjelwe eKapa, izolo ekuseni, ngoLwesihlanu kuthathwe isinqumo sokuthi uhlehliswe ngenxa yokuthi izangoma zezulu, bese ziqinisekise ukuthi idolobha iKapa nezindawo eziningi ezingaphansi kwesifundazwe iWestern Cape, zizohlaselwa ngumoya onamandla ngeSonto (izolo) ozolandelwa ngumsinga obandayo ngeSonto (namuhla). Umlenze wokuqala we-Absa Run ubanjelwe eGqeberha ngoMashi, wanqotshwa u-Adriaan Wildschutt, kwabesifazane kwaphuma phambili uBrenda Jepchirchir waseKenya.

author: Nokubongwa Phenyane
text: UMNDENI wakwaMhlongo ozophinde unekele abakuleli impilo yawo njengoba uhlelo oluthi KwaNjomane lukhuza ibuya kuMzansi Wethu USIMANGELE Mhlongo, oqale ukuduma ezinkundleni zokuxhumana ngomakaChicken, useveze ukuthi ukuvulela abantu babone izinkinga zabo njengomndeni kwenze baveza isithombe sempilo ephilwa eminye imindeni. Ukusho lokhu njengoba isizini yohlelo oluthi KwaNjomane ikhuza ibuya kuMzansi Wethu ngo-7 ebusuku. USimangele uveze ukuthi ngesikhathi bevela okokuqala njengomndeni impilo yabo yashintsha kakhulu. "Sakhula njengomndeni impilo yethu yashintsha, izinto sathanda ukuzibheka ngenye indlela. Izinselelo esasibhekene nazo zazinzima kakhulu kodwa kwathi uma zivela kwithelevishini izinto zaguquka. Mina njengomuntu owayehamba phambili ezintweni zomndeni ngabhekana nezingqinamba ezihlukene nxazonke, ngenxa yokuthi kwakumele ngithathe izinqumo njengosisi, umama kanye nomholi emndenini nokuyinto engabanga lula," kusho uSimangele. Kule sizini entsha uthe abantu kuzobathusa ukubona ukuthi naye uba nezinkinga ezinkulu abhekana nazo othandweni, nokuyinto eyehlela wonke umuntu. "Kuzocaca ukuthi nakimi izinto azihlali zihamba kahle othandweni, kuya le nale. Kodwa kukho konke ivangeli engihlala ngilikhuthaza ukuthi sihloniphane. Kimina kube nzima ukuthi ngithathe ubungoma nomndeni wami ngikubeke nje eceleni, ngaba nomhawu wokuthi ngizikhethe mina bese ngiyazethemba kukho konke engikwenzayo, lokho kwenze ngenza izinto eziningi engizithandayo futhi angizisoli ngokuthatha leso sinqumo," kusho yena. Uthe nakule sizini abalandeli bohlelo bazobona izinkinga abangazifihli ziqhubeka nokuhlasela umndeni wabo, ezinye zazo ezingakaze zixazululeke selokhu baqala ukuba semehlweni abantu. Bona uthe akukhona ukuzenzisa lokhu abakuvezayo njengoba bekholelwa ekutheni ukubonakala beveza amaqiniso kungasiza nabanye. "Ababukeli abazilungiselele ngoba lukhulu oluzayo, singumndeni sazitshela ukuthi asifuni ukuvezela abantu amanga, impilo esingayiphili, ngakho sibalethele lokhu abakufunayo nabakuthandayo," kuchaza yena.

author: Simangaliso Ntshangase
text: UNKSZ Kipi Skweyiya, okubahleli bomcimbi wabesifazane nomama iMother's Day Brunch INHLANGANO esebenza ingabheke nzuzo ukusiza umphakathi Ikhethelo Society Group, izosebenzisa usuku lokuhlonipha omama, iMother’s Day, ukubahlanganisa kubhungwe ngamasu okubasiza bazimele empilweni. Lokhu kuzokwenzeka emcimbini iMother’s Day Brunch, ozoba seGarden Court Marine Parade, eThekwini ngeSonto ngo-11 ekuseni kuze kube ntambama, lapho okulindeleke ukuthi kubuthane abesifazane abangaphezu kuka-120. Kuzongenwa ngo-R600 umuntu ngamunye. Omunye wabahleli bomcimbi, uNksz Kipi Skweyiya, uthe babone kumqoka ukusebenzisa uSuku loMama ukuhlanganisa abantu besifazane babahlomise ngezinto namasu okungabazisa ukuthi bakwazi ukuzimela nokubhekana nezimo ezibahluphayo empilweni. UMBHALI wezincwadi Indlovukazi Mapule ngesinye sezikhulumi ezizobe zikwi-Mother's Day Brunch “Lokhu sikwenza ngoba sikuqonda ukuthi kuningi kangakanani okuhlupha abantu besifazane emphakathini ekubeni kube kuyibona ababhekene nomsebenzi wokukhulisa izingane, nokumisa imindeni namakhaya abahlala nabaganele kuwona,” kusho uNksz Skweyiya. Eqhuba uthe kulo mcimbi bazobe behambisana nezikhulumi nabazonandisa kuwona okubalwa umbhali wezincwadi Indlovukazi Mapule, Zonke Le Poet, umculi we-Afro pop uNdoni Radebe, uDJ uMalume Richy nozobe eqhulula amahlaya u-2K Womsakazi. UMCULI we-Afro pop uNdoni Radebe kwabazonandisa kwiMother's Day Brunch “Sihlele nezinhlelo zokuthi izethameli zomcimbi zibhucwabhucwe ukuzijabulisa, ziphinde zithole ithuba lokuxoxa nokwakha ubudlelwano bokuthi umuntu nomuntu asizakale ekhonweni analo nakunoma yini enhle akhonze ukuyenza,” usho kanje. Ngale kukaNksz Skweyiya - amanye amalungu ale nhlangano oNkk Duh Ndlovu, Nandi Goodjohn, Zah Duma, Ncamo Nkonjela, Buyi Gambu noNksz Luh Nzimande. IMBONGI uZonke Le Poet kwabazonandisa kwiMother's Brunch

author: Nonkululeko Nhlapo
text: Amaphoyisa ashaqe impahla ongumbombayi eGoli I-SAPS e-Gauteng ishaqe izimpahla zomgunyathi ezibiza cishe u-R23m ngesikhathi somkhankaso wezinhlaka eziningi ohlose ukuqeda izimpahla eziwumkokotelo kanye nezingekho emthethweni endaweni edolobheni laseGoli ngoLwesihlanu. Lo mkhankaso ubudidiyelwe uphiko oluphenya izimpahla zomgunyathi lwaseGauteng ngokwesekwa ngamaphoyisa asemngceleni, Public Order Policing (POP), uphiko lwezobugebengu bezohwebo, abavikeli bemikhiqizo kanye nophiko lwezentela lwaseNingizimu Afrika (i-SARS). Impahla eshaqwe amaphoyisa enkabeni yedolobha eGoli Amathimba abomthetho abehamba ehlola amabhizinisi asenkabeni yedolobha ukuthi ayayithobela yini imithetho. Ngesikhathi kuqhubeka lo mkhankaso kuhanjelwe izitolo ezingu-23 zaseshwa nokuholele ekutheni kuthathwe izimpahla nezicathulo zomgunyathi ezingu-27 058. Impahla ezishaqiwr zenani elilinganiselwa ku-R23m. Ama-ejensi okuqinisekisa ukuthotshelwa komthetho azoqhubeka nokuqinisa imisebenzi yokuthobela kanye nokuphoqelela ukuthotshelwa kwemithetho kulo lonke elaseGauteng ukuze kuliwe nezenzo zobugebengu ezihlobene nezimpahla zomgunyathi nezingekho emthethweni. Amateki kanokusho awasalanga

author: Mthokozisi Mncuseni
text: U-JURENZO Julius weHollywoodbets Sharks eshaya enye yama-try akhe amathathu emdlalweni we-United Rugby Championship (URC) UKUBHUBHUDLA kweHollywoodbets Sharks ngo 46-7 iBenetton yase-Italy emdlalweni owandulela owokugcina we-United Rugby Championship (URC) kuchazwe njengeholo labalandeli abawe bevuka naleli qembu laseThekwini, kule sizini, baphinda bathola nesithombe sokuthi liqhakaze kangakanani ikusasa lalo kumasizini ezayo. Lokhu kushiwo yinhloko yabaqeqeshi kwiSharks u-JP Pietersen kulandela ingcwenga yomdlalo yize ubungasasho lutho. Kulo mdlalo kugqame abadlali abancane njengoJurenzo Julius. ISharks ishaye ama-try ayisishiyagalombili kulo mdlalo obashiye bechwaza abalandeli abebephume ngezinkani ngoMgqibelo ntambama, eHollywoodbets King’s Park Stadium, eThekwini. UPietersen othathe umsebenzi maphakathi nezizini kuJohn Plumtree, uzamile ukuyibuyisela emgqeni inqola kodwa kusemqoka nokukhumbula ukuthi kunesikhathi lapho eke waphoqeleka khona ukudlala ngaphandle kwabadlali abangu-22 abebelimele. UJulius owaqokwa kowe-Junior Springbok Player of The Year ngesizini edlule ushayele iSharks ama-try amathathu. Ubegqamile kulo mdlalo noZekhethelo Siyaya oneminyaka engu-18 osuswe kwi-fullback wafakwa kwi-flyhalf nakhona wafika wagqama. “Umuntu oqalayo ukusibona sidlala angazitshela ukuthi sisembangwnei wesicoco kanti lutho, sibe nomdlalo omuhle kwisizini ebinezingqinamba eizningi,” kusho uPietersen ethimbeni labezindaba leSharks. “Okwehla kahle nakakhulu ukuthi sibaholele abalandeli bethu abahlale benathi noma sekusobala ukuthi kasenzi ngendlela efanele ukwesekwa yibona. “Ngiyafisa ukuthi baqhubeke nokwenza lokhu kodwa nginethemba lokhuthi abakubone kulo mdlalo kubakhuthazile ngokungazuzwa yiqembu kumasizini ezayo. “Badlale kahle abafana abancane abaningi. Ngifisa ukuthi lokhu kungagcini ngokukhuthaza bona (abadlali) kepha kuvukuze okuthile kubalandeli ngoba bebona ukuthi liqhakaze kangakanani ikusasa leSharks ngokwabadlali abancane esinabo emabhukwini,” kusho uPietersen. Amanye ama-try eSharks shaywe nguSiya Kolisi, Andre Esterhuizen, Edwill van der Merwe noLitelihe Bester.

author: Mhlengi Shangase
text: Uthishanhloko waseSizanani Primary School eDube, eSoweto, uGugu Mdlalose ozimisele kakhulu ekufundiseni izingane ngokutshala imifino njengoba simbona lapha nezingane zesikole. Image: Dumisani Sibeko KUHLATSHWE ikhwelo lokuthi kubikwe izehlakalo zokuhlukunyezwa kwezingane emakhaya kanjalo nasezikoleni njengoba kwanda ukukhulelwa kwazo zisencane. Leli khwelo lenziwe yizinhlaka ezehlukene izolo, ngesikhathi kwethulwa umkhankaso wokuvikelwa kwezingane enkundleni yemidlalo iMangosuthu eDumbe, enyakatho yaKwaZulu-Natal. UNksz Neliswa Cekiso ongumqondisi wophiko lokuvikelwa kwezingane eMnyangweni wokuThuthukiswa koMphakathi, uthe izibalo ziveza ukuthi angaphezu kuka-3 000 amacala okuhlukunyezwa kwezingane kusuka ekoteni yokuqala kuya kweyesithathu onyakenimali u-2025/2026. "Sikhathazekile ngokudlwengulwa kwezingane ezingaphansi kweminyaka engu-16 ezigilwa abantu abadala. Sikhathazeke kakhulu nangezingane ezilalana zodwa, ezingaphansi kweminyaka engu-16. Yingakho kubalulekile ukuthi sibambisane ekulweni nalesi sihlava," usho kanje ekhuluma neNewzroom Afrika izolo, kwethulwa lo mkhankaso. Uthe bakhathazekile ngokukhulelwa kwezingane zisencane kuleli kanjalo nasesifundeni iZululand. Ngokwezibalo zeNational Child Protection Register, zekota yokuqala yonyakamali u-2025/2026 kuya kweyesithathu, angu-8 984 amacala abikwa okuhlukunyezwa kwezingame. UNksz Cekiso uthe banezinhlelo zokufundisa abazali ukuze baqaphe ngelokhozi izingane zabo. "Abanye abazali abakwazi ukusheshe babone uma izingane zabo zihlukunyeziwe. Yingakho sinezinhlelo zokubacija ukuze bakwazi ukusheshe babheke le nkinga." Izibalo zoMnyango wezobuLungiswa ziveze ukuthi andile amacala okudlwengulwa kwezingane esuka ku-127 aya ku-199 onyakenimali u-2025/2026. UNksz Cekiso ukhale nangotshwala athe bunomthelela ekutheni kuhlukunyezwe izingane. "Abahlukunyezwayo ababike enambeni yeChildline ethi-116 (mahhala). Uma kukhona ohlukunyezwayo ekhaya okungaba umama kungabikwa enombolweni yokulwa nesihlava sokuhlukunyezwa esikhungweni i-GBV, ethi: 0800 428 428. Ababikayo bazolulekwa ngokumele bakwenze baphinde badluliselwe ezinhlakeni ezifanele ukuze basizakale." Kuzokhumbuleka ukuthi othisha, othishanhloko, abahlengikazi, osonhlalakahle, odokotela kanjalo nanoma imuphi umuntu osebenza ngezingane, bayalelwa ukuthi babike uma kunengane engaphansi kuka-16 ekhulelwe. Laba bayalelwa ukuthi babike emaphoyiseni ukuze kuphenywe, kuboshwe labo abakhulelisa lezi zingane.

author: Zimbili Vilakazi
text: SEKUVELE izinsolo ezishaqisayo ngababili ababulawa eNgwelezane, enyakatho yeKwaZulu-Natal SEKUVELE izinsolo ezishaqisayo zokuthi owesifazane waseSigisi, eNgwelezane, osanda kubulawa nendodana ngesihluku babulawa ngesinqindi. Lokhu kuza emva kokuthi umndeni wabafi uthole ubuhlalu okuthiwa babuhlobise isinqindi emva kwefriji ngempelasonto, njengoba bebefihlwa ngoMgqibelo. UNkk Thuli Khumalo nendodana yakhe, uMbuso Khumalo, kuthiwa bagwazwa bafa "yisigebengu" esahlasela ekhaya labo ngoLwesine olwedlule. Ngokusho komthombo, kuvele ngesikhathi kulungiselelwa umngcwabo ukuthi ummese, okuthiwa uNkk Khumalo wayesina ngawo ngesikhathi egcagca nyakenye awubonwa. “Izihlobo kuthiwa zigcine ziligqekeza ibhokisi lomshado likaNkk Khumalo, kulandela ukuthi isihlobo esisondelene nabafi, sale saphetha ukuthi livulwe,” kusho umthombo. Uqhube wathi izihlobo zigcine ziphoqa ukuthi ligqekezwe nokuyilapho okubonakale khona ukuthi  ummese awukho. “Kuthiwa isihlobo kuthe uma sesibuzwa ukuthi uphi ummese, sathi siyabona ukuthi uthathwe yisigebengu,” kusho umthombo. Udalule nokuthi ngesikhathi kupeqululwa endlini, kube sekutholakala ubuhlalu obabuhlobise wona ummese, bulahlwe emva kwefriji. Ngesonto eledlule Isolezwe libike udaba ngokuthi izihlobo zabafi zishaya amakhala "ngesigebengu" okuthiwa sagasela kulo muzi, senzakalisa abafi. Zazikhala ngokuthi isihlobo ebesihlala nabafi sikhuluma izinto ezingafani ngesigameko. Ngakolunye uhlangothi kuthiwa lesi sihlobo satshela umndeni ukuthi isigebengu sigasele naso sikhona. Nokho kuthiwa emaphoyiseni sathi safika umonakalo usuvele wenzekile, isigebengu saphuma siqhasha, sesibona sona. Izihlobo ziphinde zaveza ukuthi okunye okwenza zishaye amakhala wukuthi kukhona izinsolo zokuhlukumeza amanye amalungu omndeni abazi ngazo, kodwa uNkk Khumalo ebengakaze abhoboke ngazo. Isihlobo sabafi, Isolezwe elalikhulume naso ngeledlule, sithe sesicela ukungaphawuli ngoba bayesaba. “Umndeni ubufuna lolu lwazi lube yimfihlo. Asazi ukuthi luphume kanjani,” kusho isihlobo. Owomndeni uqhube wathi okwenza umndeni ube namanzi emadolweni wukuthi akukaboshwa muntu namanje. “Kungangcono uma (umsolwa) esebanjiwe, esengaphakathi,” usho kanje. Okhulumela amaphoyisa KwaZulu-Natal, uLt Col Paul Magwaza, ngesikhathi eqinisekisa isigameko wathi amaphoyisa aseMpangeni aphenya amacala amabili okubulala kanjalo nelokugqekeza kulandela isigameko esenzeke eNgwelezane ngo-Ephreli 16. "Kubikwa ukuthi ubaba uthole isidumbu sendodana yakhe nesomkakhe emagumbini ahlukene, benamanxeba okugwazwa emzimbeni. Utshele amaphoyisa ukuthi ngesikhathi engena endlini, owesilisa ongaziwa uphume eyinhlamvu ephethe ubhakha, okuthe uma ejomba uthango, i-laptop yaqathaka kuwo," kusho uMagwaza. Akukaboshwa muntu ngesigameko.

author: Zakhele Xaba
text: UMDLALI wasezinhlangothini, uSanele Barns, obuyela kwiRichards Bay FC emuva kwesizini nesigamu egijima kwiStellenbosch FC Image: Isithombe:BACKPAGEPIX USIHLALO weRichards Bay, uSifiso "Jomo" Biyela, uveze ukuthi uSanele Barns ubevele efuna ukubuyela kuleli qembu elamdayisela iStellenbosch FC  ngo-2024. Lo mdlali oyibamba ezinhlangothini, wadayiswa yiBay ngo-R5 million maphakathi nesizini ka-2023/2025 kodwa waze wayifulathela emuva kokuyivikisa izembe ngokunqoba imidlalo yokuhlunga eyayidlala namaqembu eMotsepe Foundation Championship kulandela ukuqeda endaweni ka-15 kwi-log yeBetway Premiership. Emuva komdlalo wokugcina eyawudlala neBaroka eKing Zwelithini Stadium, eMlaza, uBarns wenganywa wusizi evalelisa kubalandeli beBay. UBiyela uveze ukuthi bebefuna ukumboleka uBarns kwiStellies kodwa leli qembu lafuna ukubadayisela okuyinto abayivumile. "Sesibheke ekutheni simthenge ngoba le nto yokuboleka abadlali iyahlupha. Sifuna umdlali azazi ukuthi ukuphi, abe ngowethu ukuze sibashaye ngaye uma befika lapha," kusho uBiyela. KwiStellies, uBarns udlale imidlalo engu-68, washaya amagoli ayisikhombisa, wakha ayisithupha emiqhudelwaneni ehlukene. Ekuqaleni kwesizini iBay isayinise inqwaba yabadlali abasebancane, yanyusa nabebedlala kwiDStv Diski Challenge abangenaso isipiliyoni sokudlala kwiPremiership. UBiyela uthe kuzobasiza ukubuya kukaBarns. "Ubelokhu esho ukuthi ufuna ukubuyela eqenjini. Nathi sikuvumile lokho ngoba vele akahambanga ngoba engumdlali obhedayo kodwa sasinezinkinga zemali ngaleso sikhathi. Ngaphandle kokuthi ungumdlali osezingeni eliphezulu, ungumuntu okukuhle ukuba naye eqenjini. Uzosisiza kakhulu ngesipiliyoni sakhe ngoba sinabadlali abasebancane eqenjini," kusho uBiyela. IBay isendaweni yesishiyagalolunye kwi-log yePremiership ngamaphuzu angu-18 emidlalweni engu-15. Izobhekana neLamontville Golden Arrows emdlalweni wePremiership wabakhaya baKwaZulu-Natal eMhlathuze Sports Complex, eRichards Bay, ngo-7.30 ebusuku.

author: Sabelo Nsele
text: UMNUZ Melikhaya Ngcongo IBONA ukufunda kwezimeya kungaba yikhambi elingaqeda idimoni lokungalandelwa kwemigomo komasipala baKwaZulu-Natal iMeya kaMasipala waseRichmond esanda kuthweswa iziqu zemfundo ephakeme, uMnuz Melikhaya Ngcongo. UNgcongo uthe ukuncipha kwezimeya ezingaziboni izimpukane kuzokwenza ukuthi banciphe nomasipala abathola imibiko enogcobho. Ukusho lokhu engxoxweni abe nayo neSolezwe. UNgcongo usanda kuthweswa iziqu iPost Graduate Diploma in Public Management eNyuvesi yasePitoli. Umasipala awuphethe wenza kahle kakhulu ekuphathweni kwemali njengoba uyingxenye yomasipala abane baKwaZulu-Natal abathole imibiko engenagcobho ngonyaka odlule. Bekungunyaka wesibili umasipala uthola umbiko ongenawo ugcobho, kanti lona ngunyaka wesithathu uNgcongo esesihlalweni. UNgcongo uthe kuba lula ukuthi izikhulu zizenzele umathanda uma imeya ingayazi imithetho eyengamele ukusetshenziswa kwemali. "Uma uyimeya uwena ongusihlalo wekomiti lezezimali kumasipala. Uma imeya ingaziboni izimpukane kuzokonakala. Izikhulu zizozenzela umathanda. Ngeke sifunde sonke siyizimeya, kodwa labo ithuba elisavuma kubona kufanele baye kofunda. Uma uwumholi kufanele uwazi umsebenzi wezikhulu zomasipala kanye nemithetho ethinta ukuphathwa kwemikhandlu. Ugcina uvuma noma izikhulu sezenza izinto ezingalungile uma ungayazi imithetho." UNgcongo uthe izimeya kufanele ziqinisekise ukulandelwa kwemithetho uma zifuna ukuthola imibiko engenagcobho. "Ngeke uwuthole umbiko ongenagcobho uma ungathembekile. Kufanele uqashe abantu abawaziyo umsebenzi. Omasipala abaningi bathola imibiko enogcobho ngenxa yokuthi abayilandeli imigomo uma besebenzisa imali. Inkinga enkulu ilapha ophikweni okukhishwa kulo amathenda." UNgcongo uthe usaphokophele ukuthola ezinye iziqu zemfundo ephakeme. "Uma uwumholi kubalulekile ukuthi uzithuthukise ngolwazi. Ngesikhathi ngiqokelwa ukuphatha umasipala ngo-2023 ngabona ukuthi kuningi engingakwazi mayelana nokuphathwa komasipala kanye nokusetshenziswa kwemali yomphakathi." UNgcongo uthe uyaqhubeka nezifundo zakhe njengoba manje esenza iMasters. Ebuzwa ukuthi ngabe ufisa ukufinyelela eziqwini zobudokotela yini uthe uzofinyelela uma iNkosi ivuma. UNgcongo uthe bekungelula ukuqhuba iziqu zemfundo ephakeme. "NgesiZulu nje ngingathi ibingitibulisa, namanje ngisaqhubeka nokutibula ngoba ngisaqhubeka nokufunda. Akulula ukucaza isikhathi sakho njengoba bengifunda ngisebenza. Ukuzimisela kwami yikhona okwenze ukuthi ngigcine ngiphumelela."

author: Zakhele Xaba
text: UMDLALI weMamelodi Sundowns, uSiyabonga Mabena, ngomunye wabathwele leli qembu kwiDStv Diski Challenge Image: Isithombe:BACKPAGEPIX IMAMELODI Sundowns iqhubekile nokukhombisa ukuthi yilona iqembu okungathenjelwa kulona ekuphazamiseni i-Orlando Pirates eshosholozayo emjahweni weligi yeDStv Diski Challenge. ISundowns icoshe amaphuzu amathathu kwiSiwelele FC emdlalweni obuse-UJ Soweto Campus izolo, ewunqobe ngo 2-1. Lo mphumela uqinisekise ukuthi iSundowns isahleli endaweni yesibili kwi-log ngamaphuzu angu-36 emuva kwemidlalo engu-17. IPirates, exebule iSekhukhune United ngo 2-1, izihola phambili ngamaphuzu angu-43 emuva kwemidlalo engu-17. Ukuvula kwayo igebe lamaphuzu ayisikhombbisa esicongweni se-log akubuzwa ukuthi kuyibeka ebuhleni njengoba sekuqale umzuliswano wesibili wesizini yeDiski. Nokho, iSundowns isalokhu iqhubekile nokuhlala eduze, igade ukuqhuzuka kweZimnyama ezisemkhankasweni wokuwina iligi okokuqala emlandweni weDiski eyasungulwa ngo-2014. Nakuba iSundowns ibukeka izoyifaka ingcindezi iPirates kodwa kunzima ukuziba iStellenbosch esiyiwine kabili iligi yeDiski. Leli qembu, eliphekwa ngu-Evangelos Vellios, linyukele endaweni yesithathu kwi-log ngamaphuzu angu-34 ngemuva kokwehlula iMagesi ngo 4-1 e-Idas Valley, eStellenbosch, ngoMgqibelo. Akubuzwa ukuthi ukwenyuka kweStellies, esele ngamaphuzu amabili kwiSundowns, kuzoyinika ithemba lokuthi isengafika esicongweni uma kuqhuzuka iPirates ejwayele ukwehluleka ekugcineni. Womabili amaqembu alandela iPirates anaso isipiliyoni sokuwina iligi kodwa eZimnyama zishaya ngomqeqeshi, uRoscoe Krieling, owayiphakamisa indebe kwiSuperSport United eyiphini likaThabo Septhemba. Okudingwa yiPirates wukuqhubeka nokuqoqa amaphuzu ukuze ingaphindwa okujwayelekile, okuwukulahla iligi emidlalweni yokugcina yesizini. Imiphumela yemidlalo yeDStv Diski Challenge: Kaizer Chiefs 0-0 TS Galaxy; Orlando Pirates 2-1 Sekhukhune United; Stellenbosch FC 4-1 Magesi; Richards Bay FC 3-4 Golden Arrows; Chippa United 0-2 Durban City; Siwelele FC 1-2 Mamelodi Sundowns; Marumo Gallants 0-1 AmaZulu; Polokwane City 0-0 Orbit College.

author: Charles Khuzwayo
text: UMPHATHISWA eMnyangweni wezeMpilo eKZN, uNomagugu Simelane-Mngadi, esegqoke izevatho  zase-UCCSA Image: FACEBOOK/KZNDSD BEKUMNANDI kudelile enkonzweni yebandla i-United Congregational Church of Southern Africa (UCCSA) egatsheni laseMzinyathi njengoba bekwamukelwa njengelungu elisha uMphathiswa eMnyangweni wezeMpilo KwaZulu-Natal, uNkk Nomagugu Simelane-Mngadi ngeSonto. Kule ndumezulu yenkonzo bekukhona abaholi bomphakathi nabazalwane bamahlelo ahlukahlukene. Kubaholi ababonakale kule nkonzo bekukhona noMphathiswa woMnyango wokuThuthukiswa koMphakathi uMbali Shinga, owayenguMphathiswa wezemiDlalo, ezobuCiko namaSiko kulesi sifundazwe uWeziwe Thusi nowake wawuphatha lo mnyango uHlengiwe Mavimbela. UMhlonishwa uShinga uthe bebengayile ukuyoqhuba ivangeli lokuhambela imiphakathi kuphela kodwa bebeyoqinisa ubudlelwano phakathi kukahulumeni nabantu abasemazingeni aphansi. "Bekuwumoya obugcwele intokozo, indumiso nenhlokomo njengoba besihlabelela futhi sigwaba ndawonye siqhakambisa iqhaza elinamandla elibanjwe yinkolo nobumbano emphakathini." UMphathiswa uthe ubuye wanikezwa ithuba lokugibela esteji lapho egcine esemukelisa izaguga zebandla izinduku zokudondolozela. Uthe kuye kusho lukhulu lokho ngoba bekuqinisekisa ukuzibophezela koMnyango wokuThuthukiswa koMphakathi ekwesekeni abantu abadala, uvikele isithunzi sabo futhi uqinisekise ukuthi bazizwa besabalulekile futhi benakekelwa emphakathini. "Imizuzu efuze lena isikhumbuza ukuthi ukulethwa kwentuthuko akusiyo inqubomgomo kodwa kuwukuxhumana kwabantu, ukubanakekela nokuba sempilweni yabo," kusho uShinga. UMphathiswa uthe imfudumalo nothando olukhonjiswe yibandla kukhombise ubumqoka bokweseka abantu, ikakhulukazi abadala nokuqinisekisa ukuthi abekho abashiywa ngaphandle. Eqhuba uMphathiswa uthe ukubambisana kuveza iqhaza elimqoka elibanjwe ngabezenkolo ekwesekeni imiphakathi, ikakhulukazi ngezikhathi ezinzima. Uthe njengohulumeni bazoqhubeka nokuzibophezela ekusebenzisaneni nabezenkolo ukuze baqinise izinhlelo zokulekelela imiphakathi yaKwaZulu-Natal. "Ngokubambisana, ngenkolo nokulethwa kwentuthuko, siyaqhubeka nokugcina isithunzi, ukwakha nokunakekela imiphakathi," kuphetha uMphathiswa woMnyango wokuThuthukiswa koMphakathi KwaZulu-Natal. UMHLONISHWA uMbali Shinga ebingelela uNkk Weziwe Thusi e-UCCSA Image: FACEBOOK/KZNDSD UMPHATHISWA uNomagugu Simelane-Mngadi ephahlwe nguNkk Weziwe Thusi noMphathiswa uMbali Shinga ngesikhathi emukelwa njengelungu elisha lase-UCCSA Image: FACEBOOK/KZNDSD UMHLONISHWA uHlengiwe Mavimbela ubekwabebehambele inkonzo yase-UCCSA Image: FACEBOOK/KZNDSD UMPHATHISWA uNomagugu Simelane-Mngadi efunga njengelungu elisha lase-UCCSA Image: FACEBOOK/UCCSA UMPHATHISWA uMbali Shinga emukelisa abefundisi base-UCCSA izinduku zokudondolozela zezaguga Image: FACEBOOK/KZNDSD OMUNYE wabaholi be-ANC ophikweni lwabesifazane eyingxenye yabazalwane ebebehambele inkonzo yase-UCCSA Image: FACEBOOK/KZNDSD BEKUKHONA amahlelo ahlukahlukene enkonzweni yokwamukela uMphathiswa uNomagugu Simelane-Mngadi Image: FACEBOOK/KZNDSD

author: Nonkululeko Nhlapo
text: Kuphele 'ukuphapha' kuboshwa abebedlala ngezulu lezandla Amaphoyisa aseNingizimu Afrika (SAPS) abophe amadoda amabili ayamaniswa nezibhamu abonakale kwi-video esakazwa ezinkundleni zokuxhumana lapho abesifazane bebonakala bedlala budedengu bephethe izibhamu. Emuva kokusabalala kwe-video, abeSAPS Gauteng Crime Intelligence baqale umkhankaso wokuthungatha abasolwa okuwaholele eTembisa, eGauteng, lapho abasolwa betholakale khona baboshwa. Izibhamu ezibonakale kuvidiyo zithathwe ngamaphoyisa kanti uphenyo lokuqala luveza ukuthi lezi zibhamu azinalayisensi. Ngesikhathi kuqhubeka lo mkhankaso abasolwa baphinde batholakala nemoto ebiduniwe. I-Gauteng Crime Intelligence iyaqhubeka nokuphenya ngabasolwa. Laba balisa ababili abaneminyaka engu-21 no-34 baboshelwe ukwephula umthetho iFirearms Control Act, ukutholakala nezibhamu ezingekho emthethweni nezinhlamvu kanye nokuba nemoto eduniwe. Amantombazane abonakala kule video agcine atholakele ngemuva kokuthi umkhondo wabasolwa ukhombe amaphoyisa lapho ahlala e-Ebony Park, eMidrand. Ngesikhathi amaphoyisa ebuza ngawo kuvele ukuthi abonwe namadoda aseNingizimu Afrika eshayela imoto emhlophe yohlobo lwe-VW Polo. Imoto ibe isivinjwa eduze kwaseKaalfontein, abesifazane ababili abebefunwa batholakale emotweni base beyiswa eTembisa South SAPS. Amaphoyisa aphinde axwayise amalungu omphakathi ngokuphatha budedengu kanye nokukhonjiswa kwezibhamu, ngoba lokho kubeka izimpilo zabantu engozini futhi kuyicala elinzima. Abasolwa kulindeleke bavele eNkantolo yeMantshi yaseTembisa ngesonto elizayo.

author: Mhlengi Shangase
text: AKAXHAMAZELI uMengameli Cyril Ramaphosa, odabeni lwezinsolo ezibhekene noNgqongqoshe wokuThuthukiswa koMphakathi kuleli, uNksz Sisisi Tolashe. UNksz Tolashe usolwa ngokudukisa iPhalamende odabeni lomnikelo wezimoto ezimbili ezanikelelwa uphiko lwabesifazane lwe-ANC, angumengameli walo. Kuthiwa lezi zimoto ezazinikelelwe lolu phiko, wazinika izingane zakhe. Kuthiwa akazange ayiveze indaba yazo ebuzwa ePhalamende. Izolo emhlanganweni wasePhalamende, uthe akazange ayiveze indaba yazo ngoba zazinikelelwe i-ANC Womens League. "Kunezinsolo zokuthi ngadukisa iPhalamende, okungelona iqiniso." Okhulumela uRamaphosa, uMnuz Vincent Magwenya, ekhuluma nabezindaba izolo eKapa, uthe umengameli uwutholile umbiko ngoNksz Tolashe. "Umengameli uwumuntu ongaxhamazeli, othatha isikhathi sakhe uma enza into. Uwutholile umbiko odabeni oluthinta izimoto, maduzane ngeke ngimangale uma ehlangana naye uNksz Tolashe," usho kanje. Umfelandawonye wezinyunyana iSaftu, uzwakalise ukukhathazeka ngezinsolo ezibhekiswe nguNksz Tolashe. Ibuze ukuthi kungani uRamaphosa engamthatheli izinyathelo ezinqala uNksz Tolashe? "ONgqongqoshe baqokwa ngumengameli. Kungani ke ethuli uRamaphosa odabeni lukaNksz Tolashe? Kumele asichazele ukuthi usamethemba yini uNksz Tolashe." Ithe kwayena uRamaphosa umanxebanxeba odabeni oluthinta ipulazi lakhe iPhala Phala yingakho engathathi zinyathelo. UMagwenya ebuzwa ngabanye ongqongqoshe ababonakala befambula emsebenzini wabo okubalwa uNksz Siviwe Gwarube emnyangweni weMfundo ePhakeme ojube uphenyo ngolwethenda yezincwadi, uthe akulindwe uphenyo. "Maduzane kuzomenyezelwa izinyathelo ngezinto ezithinta uhlelo lwamathenda okuthengwa kwempahla kuhulumeni. Kunenkinga enkulu eyagqanyiswa yayiKhomishini kaJaji Raymond Zondo kanjalo nekaMadlanga," kusho uMagwenya.

author: Nonkululeko Nhlapo
text: Kuthunjwe osanda kuthola ekaRAF Amaphoyisa KwaZulu-Natal ahlenge owesifazane owayethunjwe kanye nabanye abayisikhombisa ekhaya labo eChappies Section, eMandeville, eSundumbili, ngamadoda angaziwa ezintatha zangoLwesihlanu, 15 Meyi 2026. Izisulu eziyisikhombisa kubikwa ukuthi zidedelwe KwaDabeka ngemuva kwesikhashana, nokho owesifazane, osanda kuthola imali yakhe ye-Road Accident Fund (RAF), uyiswe endaweni engaziwa. Ithimba leProvincial Tracking Team lisebenze ngokuzikhandla lathola imoto eyodwa kwezimbili ezasetshenziswa ngesikhathi kuthunjwa, abopha abasolwa abathathu. Uphenyo luholele amaphoyisa ePhoenix lapho isisulu, esiseminyakeni yo-30 ubudala, sitholakale singenamyocu. Amaphoyisa anxusa abahlomuli be-RAF ukuthi bangazidaluli izinkokhelo zabo noma baziqhayise ngale mali. Abasolwa bazamile ukukhipha imali kaningi kodwa kwanhlanga zimuka nomoya, kodwa bakwazile ukuthenga ngemali elinganiselwa ku-R30 000. Abasolwa ababoshiwe bazovela enkantolo maduze. Kusathungathwa abanye abasolwa.

author: Nokubongwa Phenyane
text: UGXEKA nabakuleli abahlomula ngemali yokuvikelwa kwabokufika ngesigameko sokushiswa komuzi wakhe uNgizwe Mchunu, othi ukhale izinyembezi ebona umuzi wakhe uwumlotha. UNgizwe okwenzeke lesi sigameko eseGoli, ngeSonto ekuseni, uthe ulivulile icala emaphoyiseni. Uthe njengoba akhe endaweni yasemakhaya eMbumbulu, unesiqiniseko sokuthi abekho abokufika abebengafinyelela kule ndawo benze umonakalo ofana nalona. UNgizwe ukhuluma ngalolu hlobo ngoba usekhaleni lemibhikisho yokulwa nabantu bokuhamba abaseNingizimu Afrika ngaphandle kwezimvume. Usale unje umuzi kaNgizwe ushiswa amadoda amathathu angaziwa afike emzini wakhe eMbumbulu, emfuna ngeSonto Ekhuluma neSolezwe, uthe umzabalazo wokulwa nabokufika abasezweni ngaphandle kwamaphepha ngeke baze bawuyeke futhi akanavalo. "Noma mina ngingenaso isiqiniseko kodwa imimoya ikhomba laba balapha kithi abathatha imali yokuvikela abokufika ukuthi yibona abenze lokhu. Konke ngikushiye emaphoyiseni ukuthi  aphenye. Abokufika ngihlala kude kakhulu mina ukuthi bebengeza lapha bafike benze lo monakalo kodwa engingakusho wukuthi ngibonga ukuthi izingane ziphephile nonkosikazi, okwamanje basendaweni engaziwa muntu. Mina ngiwumuntu onedlozi elinzima kakhulu, into enjena ibingeke ivele yenzeke nje emzini wobabamkhulu ngakho ngithi abenzi bokubi bazobanjwa," kusho uNgizwe. Uzakwabo abambisene naye kulo mkhankaso, uNkosikhona "Phakelumthakathi" Ndabandaba, uthe ngeke kubanqinde amandla ukushiswa komuzi kaNgizwe njengoba abakwenzayo kuwukulwa nabantu bangaphandle abakuleli abenza izinto ezingalungile. "Thina sifuna ukuqeda amaphara, siqede ukuhlukunyezwa kwezingane ezincane. Ngesonto elidlule, sithole ingane yentombazane eneminyaka engu-13 inengane ihlala nendoda eneminyaka engu-48 yangaphandle. Izingane zethu seziphenduke amaphara ngenxa yezidakamizwa ezidayiswa yilaba bantu ngakho sifuna ukuqeda lokho, asicwasi," kusho yena. Uthe kusasa bazoya e-ICC embukisweni iToursim Indaba lapho kuzobe kunomengameli bomhlaba khona ukuze bahlale phansi nabo babatshele ukuthi abacwasi muntu kodwa yini abalwa nayo. Uveze ukuthi bahlele ukuhamba nawo amaphara bayowakhombisa omengameli abahlukene, ukuze babone ukuthi izidakamizwa zililimaze kanjani elakuleli. UShansela ehhovisi leSilo, Inkosi uMalusi Zondi, usigxeke kakhulu isigameko sokushiswa komuzi kaNgizwe wathi okwenzekile kuletha ukukhathazeka. "Sicela ukuthi abasemandleni baphenye ngalesi sigameko. Isigameko esifana nalesi siletha ukukhathazeka kakhulu. Nathi siyaxhumana naye uNgizwe ngokwenzekile futhi isimo sisiqaphe ngeso lokhozi futhi sizomeseka kuze kube sekugcineni. Sinxusa ukuthi kube noxolo, ukuthula, ukubumbana kusona sonke isizwe," kusho uZondi. Okhulumela amaphoyisa KwaZulu-Natal, uColonel Robert Netshiunda, uthe bayaphenya ngemuva kokuthungelwa kwezindlu ezintathu eMbumbulu. UNGIZWE Mchunu ufike waphelelwa amandla emzini wakhe oseMbumbulu oshisiwe ngeSonto
